需求.需求摘要: 南港分公司目前客戶的資料
需求.其他備註: 附件內容未提供在電子郵件本文中，需求者為南港分公司資深經理龐昌仁

SQL.內容:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
--2025年度現貨交易
SELECT 
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 資料年月日,
ACC.BRANCH_CODE AS 分公司代碼,
ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司名稱,
ACC.EMP_NBR 營業員員編,
ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名,
ACC.PROD_TYPE_DESC AS 帳戶類別,
ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
AA.CUSTOMER_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG AS 帳戶有效戶註記,
ACC.OPEN_SOURCE_DESC AS 開戶來源別說明,
ACC.F_PI_SIGN_FLAG AS PI簽署註記,
ACC.BANK_DESC AS 交割銀行名稱,
TO_CHAR(ACC.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 開戶日期,
TO_CHAR(ACC.CLOSE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 銷戶日期,
ACC.CLOSE_REASON_DESC AS 銷戶原因說明,
TO_CHAR(ACC.LAST_TXN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 最後往來交易日,
ACC.E_ACCT_VALID_FLAG 電子戶有效戶註記,
NVL(E.客群分類, 'D. 一般客群：3,000萬以下') AS ABCD客群,
ACC.NW_SEGMENT_DESC AS 客群,

NVL(C."202501_交易量", 0) AS "202501_交易量",
--NVL(C."202501_交易量" / MarketTXN."202501_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202501_市佔%%",
NVL(C."202502_交易量", 0) AS "202502_交易量",
--NVL(C."202502_交易量" / MarketTXN."202502_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202502_市佔%%",
NVL(C."202503_交易量", 0) AS "202503_交易量",
--NVL(C."202503_交易量" / MarketTXN."202503_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202503_市佔%%",
--NVL(C."202504_交易量", 0) AS "202504_交易量",
--NVL(C."202504_交易量" / MarketTXN."202504_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202504_市佔%%",
--NVL(C."202505_交易量", 0) AS "202505_交易量",
--NVL(C."202505_交易量" / MarketTXN."202505_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202505_市佔%%",
--NVL(C."202506_交易量", 0) AS "202506_交易量",
--NVL(C."202506_交易量" / MarketTXN."202506_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202506_市佔%%",
--NVL((C."202501_交易量"+C."202502_交易量"+C."202503_交易量"+C."202504_交易量"+C."202505_交易量"+C."202506_交易量"), 0) AS "1-6月交易量",
--NVL(C."202507_交易量", 0) AS "202507_交易量",
--NVL(C."202507_交易量" / MarketTXN."202507_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202507_市佔%%",
--NVL(C."202508_交易量", 0) AS "202508_交易量",
--NVL(C."202508_交易量" / MarketTXN."202508_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202508_市佔%%",
--NVL(C."202509_交易量", 0) AS "202509_交易量",
--NVL(C."202509_交易量" / MarketTXN."202509_市場交易量" * 10000, 0) AS "202509_市佔%%",
--C."202510_交易量",
--C."202511_交易量",
--C."202512_交易量",
NVL(CC."2025_交易量", 0) AS "2025_交易量",
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CC."2025_交易量" DESC NULLS LAST) AS "2025_交易量排名",
NVL(TXN_CHANNEL."2025_台股人工交易金額", 0) AS "2025_台股人工交易金額",
NVL(TXN_CHANNEL."2025_台股電子交易金額", 0) AS "2025_台股電子交易金額",
NVL((C."202501_交易量"+C."202502_交易量"+C."202503_交易量"), 0) / (MarketTXN."202501_市場交易量"+MarketTXN."202502_市場交易量"+MarketTXN."202503_市場交易量") * 10000 AS "2025_市佔%%",
NVL(INV."2025_台股庫存", 0) AS "2025_台股庫存",
NVL(INV2."202501_融資餘額", 0) as "202501_融資餘額",
NVL(INV2."202502_融資餘額", 0) as "202502_融資餘額",
NVL(INV2."202503_融資餘額", 0) as "202503_融資餘額",
NVL(INV3."2025_財管庫存", 0) as "2025_財管庫存",

--NVL(ROUND(SREV."2025_經紀貢獻度", 0), 0) AS "2025_經紀貢獻度",
--NVL(ROUND(F."2022_財管貢獻度", 0), 0) AS "2022_財管貢獻度",
--NVL(ROUND(F."2023_財管貢獻度", 0), 0) AS "2023_財管貢獻度",
--NVL(ROUND(F."2025_財管貢獻度", 0), 0) AS "2025_財管貢獻度",
--NVL(TXN_23."2023_交易量", 0) AS "2023_交易量",

NVL(WPTran.雙向借券_金額, 0) AS "2025_雙向借券_金額",
NVL(WPTran.不限用途借貸_金額, 0) AS "2025_不限用途借貸_金額",
NVL(WPQty.國內期貨_口數, 0) + NVL(WPQty.國外期貨_口數, 0) + NVL(WPQty.國內選擇權_口數, 0) + NVL(WPQty.國外選擇權_口數, 0) AS "2025_期貨選擇權_口數",
NVL(WPTran.集保境內基金_金額, 0) + NVL(WPTran.信託境內外基金_金額, 0) + NVL(WPTran.複委託境外基金_金額, 0) AS "2025_基金_金額",
NVL(WPTran.海外債_金額, 0) AS "2025_海外債_金額",
NVL(WPTran.海外股票_金額, 0) AS "2025_海外股票_金額",
NVL(WPTran.境內結構型商品_金額, 0) + NVL(WPTran.境外結構型商品_金額, 0) AS "2025_結構型商品_金額",
NVL(ITXN.壽險_金額, 0) AS "2025_壽險_金額"

FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC

LEFT JOIN
    (
    SELECT
    PARTY_ID,
    MAX(party_name) AS CUSTOMER_NAME
    FROM
    s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name
    GROUP BY PARTY_ID
    ) AA
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.PARTY_ID = AA.PARTY_ID

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    歸戶 AS PARTY_ID,
    MAX(客群分類) AS 客群分類
    FROM s_taichiehfan.經紀客群2024H1_雙證
    WHERE 1 = 1 
    AND 主ID = 'Y'
    GROUP BY 歸戶
    ) E
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.PARTY_ID = E.PARTY_ID

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    A.* 
    FROM 
        (
        SELECT 
        ACCT_NBR,
        SNAP_YYYYMM,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS "交易量"
        FROM 
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_ACCOUNT_TXN
        WHERE 1 = 1
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
        AND SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
        GROUP BY SNAP_YYYYMM, ACCT_NBR
        )
    
    PIVOT 
        (
        SUM(交易量)
        FOR SNAP_YYYYMM IN (
            '202501' AS "202501_交易量", 
            '202502' AS "202502_交易量", 
            '202503' AS "202503_交易量", 
            '202504' AS "202504_交易量", 
            '202505' AS "202505_交易量", 
            '202506' AS "202506_交易量",
            '202507' AS "202507_交易量",
            '202508' AS "202508_交易量",
            '202509' AS "202509_交易量",
            '202510' AS "202510_交易量",
            '202511' AS "202511_交易量",
            '202512' AS "202512_交易量"
            )
        ) A
    ) C
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.ACCT_NBR = C.ACCT_NBR

LEFT JOIN
    (
    SELECT ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN CHANNEL_CODE = '001' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2025_台股電子交易金額",
    SUM(CASE WHEN CHANNEL_CODE = '002' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2025_台股人工交易金額"
    FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
    AND TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
    GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
    )TXN_CHANNEL
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.ACCT_NBR = TXN_CHANNEL.ACCT_NBR
    
LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS "2023_交易量"
    FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_ACCOUNT_TXN
    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202301' AND '202312'
    GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
    ) TXN_23
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.ACCT_NBR = TXN_23.ACCT_NBR

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS "2025_交易量"
    FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_ACCOUNT_TXN
    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
    GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
    ) CC
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.ACCT_NBR = CC.ACCT_NBR

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS "2025_台股庫存"
    FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYYMM') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYYMM')
    GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
    ) INV
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.ACCT_NBR = INV.ACCT_NBR

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS "2025_財管庫存"
    FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '220', '230', '240', '420', '540', '6L0')
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYYMM') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYYMM')
    GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
    ) INV3
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.ACCT_NBR = INV3.ACCT_NBR

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SNAP_YYYYMM = '202501' THEN BAL_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "202501_融資餘額",
    SUM(CASE WHEN SNAP_YYYYMM = '202502' THEN BAL_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "202502_融資餘額",
    SUM(CASE WHEN SNAP_YYYYMM = '202503' THEN BAL_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "202503_融資餘額"
    FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND INVE_TYPE_CODE = '004'
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
    GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
    ) INV2
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.ACCT_NBR = INV2.ACCT_NBR

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    B.BRANCH_CODE, 
    B.BRANCH_NAME, 
    B.PARTY_ID,
    SUM(CASE WHEN A.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202212' THEN REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2022_財管貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN A.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202301' AND '202312' THEN REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2023_財管貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN A.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512' THEN REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2025_財管貢獻度"
    FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_REVENUE A
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT B ON A.ACCT_NBR = B.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR AND A.PROD_TYPE_CODE = B.PROD_TYPE_CODE

    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND A.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202512'
    AND A.PROD_TYPE_CODE IN ('200', '400', '600')
    -- 100 台股 / 200 複委託 / 300 期貨 / 400 財管信託 / 600 壽險
    GROUP BY B.BRANCH_CODE, B.BRANCH_NAME, B.PARTY_ID
    ) F
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = F.BRANCH_CODE
AND ACC.BRANCH_NAME = F.BRANCH_NAME
AND ACC.PARTY_ID = F.PARTY_ID

LEFT JOIN 
    (
    SELECT 
    B.BRANCH_CODE, 
    B.BRANCH_NAME, 
    B.PARTY_ID,
    SUM(REV_AMT_TWD) AS "2025_經紀貢獻度"
    FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_REVENUE A
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT B ON A.ACCT_NBR = B.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR AND A.PROD_TYPE_CODE = B.PROD_TYPE_CODE

    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND A.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
    AND A.PROD_TYPE_CODE IN ('100', '300')
    -- 100 台股 / 200 複委託 / 300 期貨 / 400 財管信託 / 600 壽險
    GROUP BY B.BRANCH_CODE, B.BRANCH_NAME, B.PARTY_ID
    ) SREV
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = SREV.BRANCH_CODE
AND ACC.BRANCH_NAME = SREV.BRANCH_NAME
AND ACC.PARTY_ID = SREV.PARTY_ID

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT * 
    FROM 
        (
        SELECT 
        A.PROD_MTYPE_DESC, 
        B.BRANCH_CODE, 
        B.BRANCH_NAME, 
        B.PARTY_ID, 
        SUM(A.TXN_AMT_TWD) AS "交易金額"
        FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_PROD_TXN A
        LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT B ON A.ACCT_NBR = B.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR AND A.PROD_TYPE_CODE = B.PROD_TYPE_CODE
    
        WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
        --AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '230', '540', '240', '6L0')
        --110 一般台股 / 120 集保基金 / 150 雙向借券 / 160 不限用途借貸 / 170 圈購配售 /210 海外股票 / 
        --220 境外基金 / 230 海外債 / 240 境外結構型商品 / 3C0 國內期貨 / 3F0 國外期貨 / 3P0 選擇權 / 
        --420 信託基金 / 450 信託借券 / 470 信託存款 / 540 境內結構型商品 / 6L0 壽險
        GROUP BY A.PROD_MTYPE_DESC, B.BRANCH_CODE, B.BRANCH_NAME, B.PARTY_ID
        )
    PIVOT 
        (
        SUM(交易金額)
        FOR PROD_MTYPE_DESC IN (
        '一般台股' AS "一般台股_金額",
        '集保境內基金' AS "集保境內基金_金額",
        '雙向借券' AS "雙向借券_金額",
        '不限用途借貸' AS "不限用途借貸_金額",
        '承銷申購' AS "承銷申購_金額",
        '海外股票' AS "海外股票_金額",
        '複委託境外基金' AS "複委託境外基金_金額",
        '海外債' AS "海外債_金額",
        '境內結構型商品' AS "境內結構型商品_金額",
        '境外結構型商品' AS "境外結構型商品_金額",
        '國內期貨' AS "國內期貨_金額",
        '國外期貨' AS "國外期貨_金額",
        '國內選擇權' AS "國內選擇權_金額",
        '選擇權' AS "國外選擇權_金額",
        '信託境內外基金' AS "信託境內外基金_金額",
        '壽險' AS "壽險_金額")
        )
    ) WPTran
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = WPTran.BRANCH_CODE
AND ACC.BRANCH_NAME = WPTran.BRANCH_NAME
AND ACC.PARTY_ID = WPTran.PARTY_ID

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT * 
    FROM 
        (
        SELECT 
        A.PROD_MTYPE_DESC, 
        B.BRANCH_CODE, 
        B.BRANCH_NAME, 
        B.PARTY_ID, 
        SUM(A.FUTURE_TXN_QTY) AS "交易口數"
        FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_PROD_TXN A
        LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT B ON A.ACCT_NBR = B.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR AND A.PROD_TYPE_CODE = B.PROD_TYPE_CODE
    
        WHERE 1 = 1
        AND A.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
        --AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '230', '540', '240', '6L0')
        --110 一般台股 / 120 集保基金 / 150 雙向借券 / 160 不限用途借貸 / 170 圈購配售 /210 海外股票 / 
        --220 境外基金 / 230 海外債 / 240 境外結構型商品 / 3C0 國內期貨 / 3F0 國外期貨 / 3P0 選擇權 / 
        --420 信託基金 / 450 信託借券 / 470 信託存款 / 540 境內結構型商品 / 6L0 壽險
        GROUP BY A.PROD_MTYPE_DESC, B.BRANCH_CODE, B.BRANCH_NAME, B.PARTY_ID
        )
    PIVOT 
        (
        SUM(交易口數)
        FOR PROD_MTYPE_DESC IN (
        '國內期貨' AS "國內期貨_口數",
        '國外期貨' AS "國外期貨_口數",
        '國內選擇權' AS "國內選擇權_口數",
        '選擇權' AS "國外選擇權_口數")
        )
    ) WPQty
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = WPQty.BRANCH_CODE
AND ACC.BRANCH_NAME = WPQty.BRANCH_NAME
AND ACC.PARTY_ID = WPQty.PARTY_ID

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
    A.PROD_MTYPE_DESC, 
    A.BRANCH_CODE, 
    A.BRANCH_NAME, 
    A.PARTY_ID, 
    SUM(A.TXN_AMT_TWD) AS "壽險_金額",
    SUM(A.SERVICE_FEE_AMT_TWD) AS "壽險_貢獻"
    FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN A
    WHERE 1 = 1
    AND A.TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512' 
    GROUP BY A.PROD_MTYPE_DESC, A.BRANCH_CODE, A.BRANCH_NAME, A.PARTY_ID
    ) ITXN
ON 1 = 1
AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = ITXN.BRANCH_CODE
AND ACC.BRANCH_NAME = ITXN.BRANCH_NAME
AND ACC.PARTY_ID = ITXN.PARTY_ID

LEFT JOIN (
   SELECT * 
    FROM 
        (
        SELECT 
        SNAP_YYYYMM, 
        MARKET_INFO_CODE, 
        MARKET_INFO_DESC, 
        ((SUM(MARKET_STOCK_TXNS))) AS 市場交易_金額
        FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_MARKET_SHARE
        WHERE 1 = 1
        AND SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512' 
        AND MARKET_INFO_CODE = '001' --001 台股交易量 / 002 融資交易量 / 003 期權交易量 / 004 上市櫃淨手收 / 005 投資人占比
        GROUP BY SNAP_YYYYMM, MARKET_INFO_CODE, MARKET_INFO_DESC --MARKET_CODE, MARKET_DESC
        )
    PIVOT 
        (
        SUM(市場交易_金額)
        FOR SNAP_YYYYMM IN (
            '202501' AS "202501_市場交易量", 
            '202502' AS "202502_市場交易量", 
            '202503' AS "202503_市場交易量", 
            '202504' AS "202504_市場交易量", 
            '202505' AS "202505_市場交易量", 
            '202506' AS "202506_市場交易量",
            '202507' AS "202507_市場交易量",
            '202508' AS "202508_市場交易量",
            '202509' AS "202509_市場交易量",
            '202510' AS "202510_市場交易量",
            '202511' AS "202511_市場交易量",
            '202512' AS "202512_市場交易量"
        )
    )
) MarketTXN
ON 1 = 1

WHERE 1 = 1
AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '962A'
--AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' --100 台股 / 200 複委託 / 300 期貨 / 400 財管信託 / 500 自營
ORDER BY ACC.BRANCH_CODE, ACC.EMP_NBR, ACC.ACCT_NBR, ACC.PARTY_ID 
;

業務場景.業務場景: 精準行銷與專案名單篩選
業務場景.分類理由: 該 SQL 邏輯核心在於計算南港分公司客戶的 2025 年交易量，並透過與市場總交易量（MarketTXN）的關聯來計算市佔率（bps），同時使用 ROW_NUMBER() 產出「2025_交易量排名」。此類針對分公司客戶進行排名分析與市場佔有率觀測的報表，完全符合「市佔率與交易排名分析」標籤中提及的交易量、市佔率（bps）與客戶排行特徵。

業務場景.gemini審查意見: 原標籤「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」通常適用於針對特定促銷活動（如借券專案、高股利客戶篩選）的客群圈選；然而本案需求重點在於南港分公司全體客戶的績效衡量與市場地位分析，並產出交易量排名與市佔率數據，故建議修改為「市佔率與交易排名分析」更為貼切。
業務場景.原始標籤: 精準行銷與專案名單篩選
業務場景.openai複審理由:
從案例內容與SQL片段來看，需求僅是「篩選南港分公司目前客戶」並輸出客戶/帳戶層級清單（分公司、營業員、帳戶類別、帳號、證號、姓名、帳戶有效、開戶來源、PI簽署、交割銀行、開戶日等）。內容沒有任何市佔率(bps)、交易量、Top N排行或排名計算邏輯，因此不符合「市佔率與交易排名分析」。

在兩個候選標籤中，原標籤「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」雖然典型會出現更明確的專案規則（如特定活動門檻、特定標的持倉、促轉等），但本案本質仍是以分公司為條件的名單型輸出，且欄位偏向業務可直接使用的客戶名單欄位（含PI簽署、交割銀行、開戶來源等），更接近名單篩選用途。

不過，若嚴格依固定標籤定義，本案其實更像「一般分公司客戶名單/基礎客戶資料」查詢，固定選項中沒有完全精準對應者；因此不建議採用Gemini的「市佔率與交易排名分析」，並建議在既有標籤中仍以「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」作為最貼近的落點。
業務場景.審查狀態: 建議第三標籤🔍需人工確認

需求.需求摘要: 全公司線下（現場/臨櫃）開戶數分佈
篩選條件: 排除部分無生日之法人客戶

SQL.內容:
WITH DATA_ AS (
SELECT
    CASE WHEN CUSTOMER.AGE <= 18 THEN '1~18歲'
         WHEN CUSTOMER.AGE > 18 AND CUSTOMER.AGE <= 39 THEN '19-39歲'
         WHEN CUSTOMER.AGE > 39 AND CUSTOMER.AGE <= 59 THEN '40-59歲'
         WHEN CUSTOMER.AGE > 59 THEN '60歲以上'
         ELSE 'NOT SUPPOSED EXIST' END AS AGE_GROUP,
    CUSTOMER.AGE,
    CASE WHEN (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS VALID_FLAG,
    CASE WHEN FUTURE_ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FUTURE_FLAG,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR,
    ACC.PARTY_ID
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_PT_CUSTOMER CUSTOMER ON ACC.PARTY_ID = CUSTOMER.PARTY_ID
LEFT JOIN
    (SELECT DISTINCT
        SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR,
        OPEN_DATE
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
    WHERE
        PROD_TYPE_CODE = '300' -- 期貨
        AND CLOSE_REASON_CODE != '007' -- 排除分公司消滅
        AND OPEN_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2025-12-31')
    ) FUTURE_ACC ON FUTURE_ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR = ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND ACC.CLOSE_REASON_CODE != '007' -- 排除分公司消滅
    AND ACC.OPEN_CHANNEL_CODE = '001' -- 臨櫃
    AND ACC.OPEN_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2024-12-31')
    AND CUSTOMER.AGE IS NOT NULL -- 部分法人客戶無生日排除
)

SELECT
    AGE_GROUP AS 年齡分佈,
    COUNT(ACCT_NBR) AS 戶數,
    ROUND(COUNT(ACCT_NBR)/47433*100, 2) AS 比例,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN VALID_FLAG = 'Y' THEN ACCT_NBR ELSE NULL END) AS 有效戶數,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN FUTURE_FLAG = 'Y' THEN ACCT_NBR ELSE NULL END)AS 加開期貨戶戶數
FROM
    DATA_
GROUP BY
    CUBE(AGE_GROUP)
ORDER BY
    DECODE(AGE_GROUP,
           '1~18歲', 0,
           '19-39歲', 1,
           '40-59歲', 2,
           '60歲以上', 3,
           NULL, 4)
;

業務場景.gemini審查意見: 原標籤「財管商品業績與例行月報」不正確。該報表的核心在於現貨與期貨的「開戶數」與「通路來源」分析，而非財管五項商品（基金、壽險、結構型等）的銷售業績、收入或貢獻度。建議修正為「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」以符合其專案統計之性質。
業務場景.原始標籤: 財管商品業績與例行月報
業務場景.openai複審理由:
本案需求是「全公司線下開戶數分佈」，以2024年臨櫃開立的現貨戶為母體，產出年齡區間戶數/比例，並補充「加開期貨戶戶數」；屬於開戶來源與客群結構的統計報表，並非財管五項商品之銷量/收入/貢獻等KPI，因此不應歸入「財管商品業績與例行月報」。

但Gemini建議的「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」通常以『輸出可供業務直接使用的名單』或至少以活動規則圈選目標客群為核心；本案沒有帳號/姓名/營業員等名單欄位，也未呈現促轉/活動規則的多條件AND篩選，偏向純統計分析而非名單圈選。因此嚴格來說也不完全吻合。

在既有固定標籤中，與「開戶後未交易、跨期動能、市佔排行、庫存損益、人員移轉」等皆不相符，相較之下「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」是唯一較接近『專案統計（戶數/滲透率/分佈）』用途的選項，雖非完美但可作為最貼近的歸類。因此結論為：不直接同意Gemini的論述（名單篩選不充分），但仍建議改用該第三標籤以取代原標籤。

需求.需求摘要: 查詢3月份台股交易量較113年10-12月月均交易量多5000萬以上客戶名單，以及113年未交易但在114年1-3月月均交易1000萬以上客戶，並查詢113年融資餘額為0但在114年1-3月融資均額100萬以上客戶。
篩選條件: 3月份台股交易量 > (113年10-12月月均交易量 + 5000萬)

SQL.檔名: 新竹分公司_25年1-3月高交易量&25年3月均提升&25年1-3月高融資均額.sql
SQL.內容:
--3月均提升5,000萬以上
with 十到十二月均 as(
    select party_id,
           ceil(sum(txn_amt_twd) / count(distinct snap_yyyymm)) as 十到十二月均
    from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_prod_txn
    where snap_yyyymm >= '202410' and snap_yyyymm <= '202412' and substr(acct_nbr,1,4) = '9647' and prod_mtype_desc = '一般台股'
    group by party_id
)
, 三月月均 as(
    select party_id, sum(txn_amt_twd) as 三月月均
    from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_prod_txn
    where snap_yyyymm = '202503' and substr(acct_nbr,1,4) = '9647' and prod_mtype_desc = '一般台股'
    group by party_id
)
select c.branch_name as 分公司名稱, c.party_id as 客戶ID, c.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號, d.party_name as 客戶姓名, c.sales_name as 營業員名稱,
       a.三月月均, nvl(b.十到十二月均,0) as 十到十二月均
from 三月月均 a
left join 十到十二月均 b on a.party_id = b.party_id
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.party_id = c.party_id and c.prod_type_desc = '台股' and c.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and c.branch_name = '新竹分公司'
left join (select distinct party_id, party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name) d on a.party_id = d.party_id
where a.三月月均 - nvl(b.十到十二月均,0) >= 50000000
;

--1-3月高交易量
with 台股交易 as(
    select party_id,
           min(snap_yyyymm) as 最早開始交易年月,
           sum(case when snap_yyyymm >= '202501' then txn_amt_twd else null end)/
            count(distinct case when snap_yyyymm >= '202501' then snap_yyyymm else null end) as 一到三月均交易量
    from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_prod_txn
    where snap_yyyymm >= '202401' and snap_yyyymm <= '202503' and substr(acct_nbr,1,4) = '9647' and prod_mtype_desc = '一般台股'
    group by party_id
)
select b.branch_name as 分公司名稱, b.party_id as 客戶ID, b.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號, c.party_name as 客戶姓名, b.sales_name as 營業員名稱,
       a.最早開始交易年月 as 今年首次交易年月, ceil(a.一到三月均交易量) as 一到三月均交易量
from 台股交易 a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.party_id = b.party_id and b.prod_type_desc = '台股' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and b.branch_name = '新竹分公司'
left join (select distinct party_id, party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name) c on a.party_id = c.party_id
where
    (最早開始交易年月 >= '202501' and 一到三月均交易量 >= 10000000)
;

--抽驗
select acct_nbr, snap_yyyymm, sum(txn_amt_twd) as 月交易量
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_prod_txn
where snap_yyyymm >= '202410'
      and acct_nbr in ('96471208540','96471287561','96471204515')
      and prod_type_desc = '台股' and prod_mtype_desc = '一般台股'
group by acct_nbr, snap_yyyymm
Order by acct_nbr, snap_yyyymm 
;

-- 1-3高融資均額
with 工作日 as( 
    select count(distinct date_did) as workdays
    from dm_s_view.m_rf_date
    where yearmonth >= '202501' and yearmonth <= '202503' and s_workday = 'Y'
)
, 融資均額 as(
    select acct_nbr, ceil(sum(margin_loan_amt_twd)/(select distinct workdays from 工作日)) as 一到三月融資均額
    from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory_dly
    where inve_type_desc in ('融資','融券') and snap_yyyymm >= '202501' and snap_yyyymm <= '202503'
    group by acct_nbr
)
, 一到十二月融資總額 as(
    select acct_nbr, sum(margin_loan_amt_twd) as 一到十二月融資總額
    from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory_dly
    where inve_type_desc in ('融資','融券') and snap_yyyymm >= '202401' and snap_yyyymm <= '202412' 
    group by acct_nbr
)
select c.branch_name as 分公司名稱, c.party_id as 客戶ID, c.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號, d.party_name as 客戶姓名, c.sales_name as 營業員名稱,
       a.一到三月融資均額
from 融資均額 a
left join 一到十二月融資總額 b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr and c.prod_type_desc = '台股' and c.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and c.branch_name = '新竹分公司'
left join (select distinct acct_nbr, party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name) d on a.acct_nbr = d.acct_nbr
where a.一到三月融資均額 >= 1000000 and nvl(一到十二月融資總額,0) = 0
;

--抽驗【檢驗逐月融資總額，並除以22簡易檢視】
select acct_nbr, snap_yyyymm, ceil(sum(margin_loan_amt_twd)/22) as 融資均額
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory_dly
where inve_type_desc in ('融資','融券') and acct_nbr in ('96471198948','96470768434')and snap_yyyymm >= '202401'       
group by acct_nbr, snap_yyyymm
order by 1,2
;

需求.需求摘要: 新板分公司需要更新後的最新名單及例行性報表資料。
需求.其他備註: 因有同仁離職需要此資料

SQL.內容:
/* 例行性報表 - 新板分公司客戶總覽 */

/* 建立暫存表 - 新板分公司有效戶母體 */
CREATE PRIVATE TEMPORARY TABLE ORA$PTT_新板有效戶
ON COMMIT PRESERVE DEFINITION AS (
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 資料日期,
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE AS 分公司代碼,
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司名稱,
    ACC.EMP_NBR 營業員員編,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名,
    ACC.PROD_TYPE_DESC AS 帳戶類別,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG AS 帳戶有效戶註記,
    ACC.OPEN_SOURCE_DESC AS 開戶來源別說明,
    ACC.F_PI_SIGN_FLAG AS PI簽署註記,
    ACC.BANK_DESC AS 交割銀行名稱,
    TO_CHAR(ACC.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 開戶日期,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群, 'G. 其他') AS 經紀客群,
    財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW AS 財管客群
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1_ALL 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
)
;

/* 台股庫存 */
WITH 台股庫存 AS (
SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS BAL_AMT_TWD
FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
WHERE
    PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM = (SELECT MAX(YEARMONTH) FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_DATE WHERE S_WORKDAY = 'Y' AND DATE_DID < SYSDATE - 1)
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
),

/* 現貨交易量 */
現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
        AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    GROUP BY
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR TXN_YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "202501_現貨交易量",
                                         '202502' AS "202502_現貨交易量",
                                         '202503' AS "202503_現貨交易量",
                                         '202504' AS "202504_現貨交易量",
                                         '202505' AS "202505_現貨交易量",
                                         '202506' AS "202506_現貨交易量",
                                         '202507' AS "202507_現貨交易量",
                                         '202508' AS "202508_現貨交易量",
                                         '202509' AS "202509_現貨交易量",
                                         '202510' AS "202510_現貨交易量",
                                         '202511' AS "202511_現貨交易量",
                                         '202512' AS "202512_現貨交易量"))
),

/* 非現貨交易量 */
非現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_UNIT_QTY AS TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '期選' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUTURE_TXN -- 期選
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '不限用途' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_LOAN_TXN -- 不限用途
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
            AND TXN_TYPE_DETAIL_CODE = '052' -- 新增
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '借券' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BSBL_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外股' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
            AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' -- 複委託
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外債' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BOND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
        UNION ALL 
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '基金' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '結構型' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_SN_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '保險' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
            AND POLICY_STATUS_CODE = '1' -- 已核保
    )
    GROUP BY
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR PROD IN ('期選' AS "2025_期選交易口數",
                                   '不限用途' AS "2025_不限用途交易量",
                                   '借券' AS "2025_借券交易量",
                                   '海外股' AS "2025_海外股交易量",
                                   '海外債' AS "2025_海外債交易量",
                                   '基金' AS "2025_基金交易量",
                                   '結構型' AS "2025_結構型交易量",
                                   '保險' AS "2025_保險交易量"))
),

/* 貢獻度 */
貢獻度 AS (
SELECT
    ACC.PARTY_ID,
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE,
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('110', '150', '160', '180', '3C0', '3F0', '3P0', '3S0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2023_經紀貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('110', '150', '160', '180', '3C0', '3F0', '3P0', '3S0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2024_經紀貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('110', '150', '160', '180', '3C0', '3F0', '3P0', '3S0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2025_經紀貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '220', '230', '240', '420', '540', '6L0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023'  THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2023_財管貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '220', '230', '240', '420', '540', '6L0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024'  THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2024_財管貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '220', '230', '240', '420', '540', '6L0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025'  THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2025_財管貢獻度"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_REVENUE REV
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC ON ACC.ACCT_NBR = REV.ACCT_NBR AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = REV.PROD_TYPE_CODE
WHERE
    REV.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202301' AND '202512'
    AND REV.REV_CODE != '6L1R01' -- 排除壽險大小公(會重複計算)
    AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
GROUP BY
    ACC.PARTY_ID,
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE
),

/* 融資餘額 */
融資餘額 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        INV.ACCT_NBR,
        INV.SNAP_YYYYMM,
        SUM(INV.MARGIN_LOAN_AMT_TWD) AS MARGIN_LOAN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY INV
    LEFT JOIN
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC ON ACC.ACCT_NBR = INV.ACCT_NBR AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = INV.PROD_TYPE_CODE
    WHERE
        INV.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
        AND INV.INVE_TYPE_CODE = '004' -- 融資
        AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
        AND INV.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
    GROUP BY
        INV.ACCT_NBR,
        INV.SNAP_YYYYMM
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(MARGIN_LOAN_AMT_TWD) FOR SNAP_YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "202501_融資餘額",
                                                  '202502' AS "202502_融資餘額",
                                                  '202503' AS "202503_融資餘額",
                                                  '202504' AS "202504_融資餘額",
                                                  '202505' AS "202505_融資餘額",
                                                  '202506' AS "202506_融資餘額",
                                                  '202507' AS "202507_融資餘額",
                                                  '202508' AS "202508_融資餘額",
                                                  '202509' AS "202509_融資餘額",
                                                  '202510' AS "202510_融資餘額",
                                                  '202511' AS "202511_融資餘額",
                                                  '202512' AS "202512_融資餘額"))
)

/* 最終表格整併 */
SELECT
    ORA$PTT_新板有效戶.*,
    NVL(台股庫存.BAL_AMT_TWD, 0) AS 最新台股庫存,
    NVL(現貨交易量."202501_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202501_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202502_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202502_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202503_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202503_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202504_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202504_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202505_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202505_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202506_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202506_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202507_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202507_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202508_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202508_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202509_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202509_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202510_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202510_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202511_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202511_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202512_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202512_現貨交易量",
    NVL("202501_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202502_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202503_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202504_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202505_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202506_現貨交易量", 0)+
    NVL("202507_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202508_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202509_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202510_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202511_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202512_現貨交易量", 0) AS "2025FY_現貨交易量",
    NVL(融資餘額."202501_融資餘額", 0) AS "202501_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202502_融資餘額", 0) AS "202502_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202503_融資餘額", 0) AS "202503_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202504_融資餘額", 0) AS "202504_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202505_融資餘額", 0) AS "202505_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202506_融資餘額", 0) AS "202506_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202507_融資餘額", 0) AS "202507_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202508_融資餘額", 0) AS "202508_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202509_融資餘額", 0) AS "202509_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202510_融資餘額", 0) AS "202510_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202511_融資餘額", 0) AS "202511_融資餘額",
    NVL(融資餘額."202512_融資餘額", 0) AS "202512_融資餘額",
    NVL(貢獻度."2023_經紀貢獻度", 0) AS "2023_經紀貢獻度",
    NVL(貢獻度."2024_經紀貢獻度", 0) AS "2024_經紀貢獻度",
    NVL(貢獻度."2025_經紀貢獻度", 0) AS "2025_經紀貢獻度",
    NVL(貢獻度."2023_財管貢獻度", 0) AS "2023_財管貢獻度",
    NVL(貢獻度."2024_財管貢獻度", 0) AS "2024_財管貢獻度",
    NVL(貢獻度."2025_財管貢獻度", 0) AS "2025_財管貢獻度",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_期選交易口數", 0) AS "2025_期選交易口數",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_不限用途交易量", 0) AS "2025_不限用途交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_借券交易量", 0) AS "2025_借券交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_海外股交易量", 0) AS "2025_海外股交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_海外債交易量", 0) AS "2025_海外債交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_基金交易量", 0) AS "2025_基金交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_結構型交易量", 0) AS "2025_結構型交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_保險交易量", 0) AS "2025_保險交易量"
FROM
    ORA$PTT_新板有效戶
LEFT JOIN
    台股庫存 ON 台股庫存.ACCT_NBR = ORA$PTT_新板有效戶.客戶帳號
LEFT JOIN
    現貨交易量 ON 現貨交易量.ACCT_NBR = ORA$PTT_新板有效戶.客戶帳號
LEFT JOIN
    非現貨交易量 ON 非現貨交易量.PARTY_ID = ORA$PTT_新板有效戶.客戶證號
LEFT JOIN
    貢獻度 ON 貢獻度.PARTY_ID = ORA$PTT_新板有效戶.客戶證號
LEFT JOIN
    融資餘額 ON 融資餘額.ACCT_NBR = ORA$PTT_新板有效戶.客戶帳號
;

需求.需求摘要: 因應新板分公司同仁離職，需最新客戶名單並請協助更新例行性報表資料

SQL.內容:
/* 離職營業員移轉客戶名單 */
SELECT
    RETIRED.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    RETIRED.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群, 'G. 其他') AS 經紀客群,
    財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW AS 財管客群,
    RETIRED.舊營業員代碼,
    RETIRED.舊營業員員編,
    RETIRED.舊營業員姓名,
    RETIRED.新營業員代碼,
    RETIRED.新營業員員編,
    RETIRED.新營業員姓名,
    RETIRED.移轉日
FROM
    (
    SELECT 
        ACC.ACCT_NBR,
        ACC.PARTY_ID,
        SUBSTR(CUCG.OFIELS, 1, 3) AS 舊營業員代碼,
        '0'||SLAB_B.EMNO AS 舊營業員員編,
        SLAB_B.NAME AS 舊營業員姓名,
        SUBSTR(CUCG.NFIELD, 1, 3) AS 新營業員代碼,
        '0'||SLAB_C.EMNO AS 新營業員員編,
        SLAB_C.NAME AS 新營業員姓名,
        CUCG.TDATE AS 移轉日,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUCG.OFIELS, ACC.ACCT_NBR ORDER BY CUCG.TDATE DESC NULLS LAST) AS 順序
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.CUCG CUCG
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.SLAB_DAY SLAB_B
        ON CUCG.TDATE = SLAB_B.SNAP_DATE AND SUBSTR(CUCG.ACNO, 1, 4) = SLAB_B.BHNO AND CUCG.OFIELS = SLAB_B.SALE -- 取得舊營業員資訊
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.SLAB_DAY SLAB_C
        ON CUCG.TDATE = SLAB_C.SNAP_DATE AND SUBSTR(CUCG.ACNO, 1, 4) = SLAB_C.BHNO AND CUCG.NFIELD = SLAB_C.SALE -- 取得新營業員資訊
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
        ON CUCG.ACNO = SUBSTR(ACC.ACCT_NBR, 1, 10) AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
    WHERE
        CUCG.FLNO = '0018' -- 移轉營業員
        AND SUBSTR(CUCG.ACNO, 1, 4) = '961H' -- 新板分公司
        AND SUBSTR(CUCG.OFIELS, 1, 3) IN ('025', '058', '076') -- 沈芳如, 林竣民, 王佩琪
    ) RETIRED
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = RETIRED.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1_ALL 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = RETIRED.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = RETIRED.PARTY_ID AND '961H' = 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼
WHERE
    RETIRED.順序 = 1
;

/* 離職營業員M_AC_ACCOUNT客戶名單 */
SELECT
    ACC.EMP_NBR AS 營業員員編,
    ACC.SALES_NBR AS 營業員代碼,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群, 'G. 其他') AS 經紀客群,
    財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW AS 財管客群
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1_ALL 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE
    ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND (ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL AND ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y') -- 有效戶
    AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '961H' -- 新板分公司
    AND ACC.EMP_NBR IN ('009065', '008839', '010673') -- 沈芳如, 林竣民, 王佩琪
;

交易動能趨勢與異動偵測

需求.需求摘要: 高雄分公司查詢價值plus客群1~3月海外股票、基金、海外債、壽險、結構型（境內、境外）交易狀況。
篩選條件: 商品類型為結構型商品（境內、境外）
需求.其他備註: 依照營業員產出子檔案。

SQL.內容:
with sales_base as (
select emp_nbr
     , emp_name as sales_name
from dm_s_view.m_pt_sales
where 1=1
and branch_name = '高雄分公司'
and emp_flag = 'Y'
)
, acct_base as (
select party_id
     , party_id_mask
     , prod_type_code
     , acct_nbr
     , emp_nbr
     , sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by party_id_mask order by prod_type_code, last_txn_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
where 1=1
and branch_name = '高雄分公司'
and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
)
, txn_base as (
select b.party_id
     , b.party_id_mask
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('210') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fs
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('230') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fb
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fund
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('540') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_dsn
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fsn
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('6L0') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_l
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_prod_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '高雄分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and b.nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
where 1=1
and a.snap_date between to_date('20250101','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250331','yyyymmdd')
group by b.party_id, b.party_id_mask
)
, txn_base_etf as (
select b.party_id
     , b.party_id_mask
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('110') and a.prod_stype_code in ('019') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_etf
from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '高雄分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and b.nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
where 1=1
and a.txn_date between to_date('20250101','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250331','yyyymmdd')
group by b.party_id, b.party_id_mask
)
select a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , b.acct_nbr as 帳號
     , e.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , round(c.txn_amt_twd_fs,0) as 海外股交易金額
     , round(c.txn_amt_twd_fb,0) as 海外債交易金額
     , round(c.txn_amt_twd_fund,0) as "基金(不含ETF)交易金額"
     , round(d.txn_amt_twd_etf,0) as ETF交易金額
     , round(c.txn_amt_twd_dsn,0) as 境內結構型交易金額
     , round(c.txn_amt_twd_fsn,0) as 境外結構型交易金額
     , round(c.txn_amt_twd_l,0) as 壽險交易金額
from sales_base a
left join acct_base b on a.emp_nbr = b.emp_nbr and b.rn = 1
left join txn_base c on b.party_id_mask = c.party_id_mask
left join txn_base_etf d on b.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
left join (select distinct party_id, party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name) e on b.party_id = e.party_id
;

業務場景.業務場景: 財管商品業績與例行月報
業務場景.分類理由: 該報表主要追蹤高雄分公司特定客群（價值Plus）在財管五項商品（海外股、基金、壽險、結構型、海外債）的交易金額與業績表現。SQL 邏輯為彙整指定期間（1月至3月）內各項商品的交易總額，屬於財富管理商品的業績統計範疇，符合管理層對特定區域與商品口徑的例行檢視需求。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報

業務場景.gemini審查意見: 原標籤「交易動能趨勢與異動偵測」不適用，因為該 SQL 僅針對單一時間區間進行加總彙整，並未包含跨期比較（例如與去年同期對比）或偵測客戶狀態由靜轉動的邏輯。建議修改為「財管商品業績與例行月報」，更能準確描述其針對多項財管商品進行銷售量/業績統計的報表性質。
業務場景.原始標籤: 交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
業務場景.openai複審理由: 此需求是針對「高雄分公司」且限定「價值plus客群」在「1~3月」期間，彙整五大財管商品（海外股票、基金含ETF、海外債、壽險、結構型境內/境外）的交易狀況，並以營業員為輸出欄位，屬於特定期間的商品交易/業績統計型報表。案例未呈現任何跨期對比（今年vs去年、前後期增減）、狀態翻轉（由靜轉動/由無到有）、或異常偵測門檻與標記，因此不符合「交易動能趨勢與異動偵測」的核心定義。相對地，內容與口徑更貼近財管商品在固定期間的例行檢視與業績/交易彙整，故同意調整為「財管商品業績與例行月報」。

需求.需求摘要: 查詢ABC經紀客群的客戶明細
需求.其他備註: 詳細需求內容已透過電話說明

SQL.內容:
/* 樹林分公司有效戶母體 */
WITH 樹林有效戶 AS (
SELECT
    ACC.AREA_NAME AS 區部,
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    'B級' AS 分公司分級,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') AS 經紀客群,
    財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW AS 財管客群,
    CASE WHEN ACC.OPEN_DATE <= TO_DATE('20230409', 'YYYYMMDD') AND 日盛.ACCT_NBR IS NULL THEN '富證'
         WHEN ACC.OPEN_DATE <= TO_DATE('20230409', 'YYYYMMDD') AND 日盛.ACCT_NBR IS NOT NULL THEN '日證'
         WHEN ACC.OPEN_DATE > TO_DATE('20230409', 'YYYYMMDD') THEN '富證'
         WHEN ACC.OPEN_DATE IS NULL THEN '開戶日空值'
         END AS 富證日盛,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG AS 帳戶有效戶註記,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID_MASK AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
LEFT JOIN
    (SELECT
        ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR AS ACCT_NBR
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
    LEFT JOIN
        DM_S_VIEW.D_S_CHANNEL_JS JS ON ACC.BRANCH_CODE = JS.BRANCH_NBR
    WHERE
        ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
        AND JS.BRANCH_NBR IS NOT NULL
        AND ACC.OPEN_DATE <= TO_DATE('20230409', 'YYYYMMDD')
    GROUP BY
        ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
    ) 日盛 ON 日盛.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '962E' -- 樹林分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
    AND SUBSTR(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 1, 1) IN ('A', 'B', 'C') -- 經紀客群ABC
),

現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    TXN.ACCT_NBR,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000, 2) AS "2022年加總(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000/12, 2) AS "2022年月均(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000, 2) AS "2023年加總(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000/12, 2) AS "2023年月均(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000, 2) AS "2024年加總(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000/12, 2) AS "2024年月均(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TXN.TXN_YYYYMM = '202501' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000, 2) AS "2025年1月(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TXN.TXN_YYYYMM = '202502' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000, 2) AS "2025年2月(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TXN.TXN_YYYYMM = '202503' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000, 2) AS "2025年3月(百萬)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TXN.TXN_YYYYMM = '202504' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END)/1000000, 2) AS "2025年4月(百萬)"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN TXN
INNER JOIN
    樹林有效戶 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶帳號 = TXN.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    TXN.TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202512'
    AND TXN.BRANCH_CODE = '962E' -- 樹林分公司
    AND TXN.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
GROUP BY
    TXN.ACCT_NBR
),

已實現損益 AS (
SELECT
    BENEFIT.ACCT_NBR,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN BENEFIT.ACTU_BENEFIT_AMT ELSE 0 END)/1000, 2) AS "2022年已實損益(仟元)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN BENEFIT.ACTU_BENEFIT_AMT ELSE 0 END)/1000, 2) AS "2023年已實損益(仟元)",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN BENEFIT.ACTU_BENEFIT_AMT ELSE 0 END)/1000, 2) AS "2024年已實損益(仟元)"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_ACTU_BENEFIT BENEFIT
INNER JOIN
    樹林有效戶 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶帳號 = BENEFIT.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    BENEFIT.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
    AND BENEFIT.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202412'
GROUP BY
    BENEFIT.ACCT_NBR
),

海外股 AS (
SELECT
    PARTY_ID,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外股2022,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外股2023,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外股2024,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外股2025
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202512'
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '962E' -- 樹林分公司
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' -- 複委託
GROUP BY
    PARTY_ID
),

海外債 AS (
SELECT
    PARTY_ID,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外債2022,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外債2023,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外債2024,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外債2025
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BOND_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202512'
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '962E' -- 樹林分公司
GROUP BY
    PARTY_ID
),

基金 AS (
SELECT
    PARTY_ID,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 基金2022,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 基金2023,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 基金2024,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 基金2025
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUND_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202512'
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '962E' -- 樹林分公司
    AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
GROUP BY
    PARTY_ID
),

結構型 AS (
SELECT
    PARTY_ID,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 結構型2022,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 結構型2023,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 結構型2024,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 結構型2025
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_SN_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202512'
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '962E' -- 樹林分公司
    AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
GROUP BY
    PARTY_ID
),

壽險 AS (
SELECT
    PARTY_ID,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 壽險2022,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 壽險2023,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 壽險2024,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 壽險2025
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202512'
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '962E' -- 樹林分公司
    AND POLICY_STATUS_CODE = '1' -- 已核保
GROUP BY
    PARTY_ID
)

SELECT
    樹林有效戶.*,
    現貨交易量."2022年加總(百萬)",
    現貨交易量."2022年月均(百萬)",
    已實現損益."2022年已實損益(仟元)",
    現貨交易量."2023年加總(百萬)",
    現貨交易量."2023年月均(百萬)",
    已實現損益."2023年已實損益(仟元)",
    現貨交易量."2024年加總(百萬)",
    現貨交易量."2024年月均(百萬)",
    已實現損益."2024年已實損益(仟元)",
    現貨交易量."2025年1月(百萬)",
    現貨交易量."2025年2月(百萬)",
    現貨交易量."2025年3月(百萬)",
    現貨交易量."2025年4月(百萬)",
    NVL(海外股.海外股2022, 0) AS 海外股2022,
    NVL(海外債.海外債2022, 0) AS 海外債2022,
    NVL(基金.基金2022, 0) AS 基金2022,
    NVL(結構型.結構型2022, 0) AS 結構型2022,
    NVL(壽險.壽險2022, 0) AS 壽險2022,
    NVL(海外股.海外股2023, 0) AS 海外股2023,
    NVL(海外債.海外債2023, 0) AS 海外債2023,
    NVL(基金.基金2023, 0) AS 基金2023,
    NVL(結構型.結構型2023, 0) AS 結構型2023,
    NVL(壽險.壽險2023, 0) AS 壽險2023,
    NVL(海外股.海外股2024, 0) AS 海外股2024,
    NVL(海外債.海外債2024, 0) AS 海外債2024,
    NVL(基金.基金2024, 0) AS 基金2024,
    NVL(結構型.結構型2024, 0) AS 結構型2024,
    NVL(壽險.壽險2024, 0) AS 壽險2024,
    NVL(海外股.海外股2025, 0) AS 海外股2025,
    NVL(海外債.海外債2025, 0) AS 海外債2025,
    NVL(基金.基金2025, 0) AS 基金2025,
    NVL(結構型.結構型2025, 0) AS 結構型2025,
    NVL(壽險.壽險2025, 0) AS 壽險2025
FROM
    樹林有效戶
LEFT JOIN
    現貨交易量 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶帳號 = 現貨交易量.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    已實現損益 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶帳號 = 已實現損益.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    海外股 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶證號 = 海外股.PARTY_ID
LEFT JOIN
    海外債 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶證號 = 海外債.PARTY_ID
LEFT JOIN
    基金 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶證號 = 基金.PARTY_ID
LEFT JOIN
    結構型 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶證號 = 結構型.PARTY_ID
LEFT JOIN
    壽險 ON 樹林有效戶.客戶證號 = 壽險.PARTY_ID
ORDER BY
    樹林有效戶.經紀客群,
    樹林有效戶.營業員姓名,
    樹林有效戶.客戶帳號
;

業務場景.業務場景: 精準行銷與專案名單篩選
業務場景.分類理由: 該 SQL 腳本的核心在於對特定客群（ABC 經紀客群）進行長達四年的跨期交易分析。腳本計算了從 2022 年到 2025 年各年度的現貨交易量（包含年加總與月均值）、已實現損益，以及五大財管商品（海外股、海外債、基金、結構型、壽險）的年度交易金額。這種「兩段或多段期間比較」以追蹤客戶交易量能與貢獻變化的邏輯，完全符合交易動能趨勢分析的特徵。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選
人員異動與客戶移轉管理

業務場景.gemini審查意見: 原標籤「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」雖然部分涉及名單產出，但該標籤通常用於特定活動規則（如 PI 資格、借券專案等單一條件篩選）。本案例的 SQL 程式碼包含大量的跨期（跨年/跨月）交易數據比較與動能追蹤，其目的是為了觀測客戶交易行為的趨勢與變化，與「交易動能趨勢與異動偵測」的定義更為貼切。
業務場景.原始標籤: 精準行銷與專案名單篩選
業務場景.openai複審理由: 從需求摘要/篩選條件/SQL 片段可見，本案核心是「查詢ABC經紀客群的客戶明細」，以客群貼標（經紀客群貼標、財管客群貼標）與有效戶母體（樹林分公司有效戶）進行名單圈選與客戶屬性整理（區部/分公司/分公司分級/經紀客群/財管客群/富證日證判斷等），目的更接近產出可供業務使用的客群名單與明細，而非跨期比較交易量、偵測成長/衰退或由靜轉動等「交易動能」邏輯。現有片段亦未出現兩段期間比較、月均/累計交易量增減、最後交易日異動標記等關鍵特徵，因此不支持改為「交易動能趨勢與異動偵測」。在固定標籤中，最貼近的是以條件篩選名單的「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」；若僅是單純客群名單查詢而非活動專案，也仍較交易動能標籤貼切。

需求.需求摘要: 查詢2022年至2025年青埔現貨前50大客戶的交易量變化及衰退、靜止狀況

SQL.內容:
/* 歷年TOP50 */
CREATE PRIVATE TEMPORARY TABLE ORA$PTT_TOP50
ON COMMIT PRESERVE DEFINITION AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        TXN_AGG.*,
        RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY TXN_YYYY ORDER BY TXN_AMT_TWD DESC) AS RK
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            ACCT_NBR,
            SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) AS TXN_YYYY,
            SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202503'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '961N' -- 青埔分公司
            AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
        GROUP BY
            ACCT_NBR,
            SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4)
        ) TXN_AGG
    )
WHERE
    RK <= 50
)
;

WITH TXN AS (
SELECT
    TXN.ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2022' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS TXN_AMT_TWD_2022,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS TXN_AMT_TWD_2023,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS TXN_AMT_TWD_2024,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS TXN_AMT_TWD_2025
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN TXN
INNER JOIN
    (SELECT DISTINCT ACCT_NBR FROM ORA$PTT_TOP50) ACC ON ACC.ACCT_NBR = TXN.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    TXN.TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202201' AND '202503'
    AND TXN.BRANCH_CODE = '961N' -- 青埔分公司
    AND TXN.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
GROUP BY
    TXN.ACCT_NBR
)

SELECT
    ORA$PTT_TOP50.TXN_YYYY || ' Top-' || ORA$PTT_TOP50.RK AS 每年TOP50,
    ORA$PTT_TOP50.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    PARTY_NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG AS 有效戶,
    ACC.CLOSE_DATE AS 銷戶日期,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員,
    TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2022 AS "2022FY現貨交易量",
    ROUND(TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2022/12, 0) AS "2022月均現貨交易量",
    TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2023 AS "2023FY現貨交易量",
    ROUND(TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2023/12, 0) AS "2023月均現貨交易量",
    TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2024 AS "2024FY現貨交易量",
    ROUND(TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2024/12, 0) AS "2024月均現貨交易量",
    TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2025 AS "2025一至三月現貨交易量",
    ROUND(TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD_2025/3, 0) AS "2025月均現貨交易量"
FROM
    ORA$PTT_TOP50
LEFT JOIN
    TXN ON TXN.ACCT_NBR = ORA$PTT_TOP50.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME ON PARTY_NAME.ACCT_NBR = ORA$PTT_TOP50.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC ON ACC.ACCT_NBR = ORA$PTT_TOP50.ACCT_NBR AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' AND ACC.CLOSE_REASON_CODE != '007'
ORDER BY
    ORA$PTT_TOP50.TXN_YYYY,
    ORA$PTT_TOP50.RK
;

需求.需求摘要: 更新斗六價值PLUS客群客戶的最新資料數據（含合計），並更新已離職員工劉秉樺的客戶營業員資訊，同時希望Q2期間每週四更新數據。
欄位: 斗六價值PLUS客群客戶最新資料數據
篩選條件: 原營業員為劉秉樺的客戶
需求.其他備註: 希望Q2期間每週四更新一次數據以利追蹤。

SQL.內容:
select a.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , c.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , a.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.age as 年齡
     , round(nvl(d.me_asset_amt_twd,0),0) as 總資產
     , a.kyc_risk_desc as kyc風險等級
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fs,0),0) as 海外股成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fb,0),0) as 海外債成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_l,0),0) as 壽險成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fund,0),0) as 基金成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_sn,0),0) as 結構型成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fs,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fb,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_l,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fund,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_sn,0),0) as 總財管成交金額
from
(
select a.party_id_mask
     , a.branch_name
     , a.nw_segment_desc
     , c.age
     , c.kyc_risk_desc
     , max(b.party_name) as party_name
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.prod_type_code = '100'
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_customer c on a.party_id = c.party_id
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '斗六分公司'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
group by a.party_id_mask
       , a.branch_name
       , a.nw_segment_desc
       , c.age
       , c.kyc_risk_desc
) a
left join
(
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fs
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fb
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fund
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_sn
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '6L0' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_l
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '斗六分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by b.party_id_mask
) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
left join
(
select party_id_mask
     , sales_name
     , prod_type_code
     , row_number() over (partition by party_id_mask order by prod_type_code, last_txn_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
where 1=1
and branch_name = '斗六分公司'
and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
) c on a.party_id_mask = c.party_id_mask and c.rn = 1
left join
(
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(a.me_asset_amt_twd) as me_asset_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_asset a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '斗六分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202504'
group by b.party_id_mask
) d on a.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
;

需求.需求摘要: 台南分公司數據需求，包含客戶及債券相關資訊。

SQL.內容:
select b.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , b.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , b.nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , b.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , c.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.currency_name as 海外債庫存幣別
     , round(a.bal_amt_twd,0) as "海外債庫存金額(折台幣)"
     , round(a.div_accu_amt_twd,0) as "海外債累計配息金額(折台幣)"
     , d.max_div_date as 最近配息日
     , d.div_amt_twd as "最近配息日配息金額(折台幣)"
from (select prod_type_code
           , acct_nbr
           , currency_name
           , sum(bal_amt_twd) as bal_amt_twd
           , sum(div_accu_amt_twd) as div_accu_amt_twd
      from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory
      where 1=1
      and snap_yyyymm  ='202504'
      and prod_type_code = '200'
      and prod_mtype_code = '230'
      group by prod_type_code
             , acct_nbr
             , currency_name) a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '台南分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
left join s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name c on b.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
left join (
select acct_nbr
     , max(max_div_date) as max_div_date
     , sum(div_amt_twd) as div_amt_twd
     , sum(accu_div_amt_twd) as accu_div_amt_twd
from
(
select a.acct_nbr
     , a.div_date as max_div_date
     , rank() over (partition by a.acct_nbr order by a.div_date desc nulls last) as rk
     , a.div_amt_twd
     , a.accu_div_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_at_div a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '台南分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '200'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '230'
)
where 1=1
and rk = 1
group by acct_nbr
) d on a.acct_nbr = d.acct_nbr
where 1=1
order by b.branch_name, b.sales_name
;

需求.需求摘要: 查詢客戶複委託債券庫存與配息相關數據，並篩選美元債券以及南一區南二區客戶資料

SQL.內容:
select b.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , b.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , b.nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , b.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , c.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.currency_name as 海外債庫存幣別
     , round(a.bal_amt_twd,0) as "海外債庫存金額(折台幣)"
     , round(a.div_accu_amt_twd,0) as "海外債累計配息金額(折台幣)"
     , d.max_div_date as 最近配息日
     , d.div_amt_twd as 最近配息日配息金額
from (select prod_type_code
           , acct_nbr
           , currency_name
           , sum(bal_amt_twd) as bal_amt_twd
           , sum(div_accu_amt_twd) as div_accu_amt_twd
      from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory
      where 1=1
      and snap_yyyymm  ='202504'
      and prod_type_code = '200'
      and prod_mtype_code = '230'
      group by prod_type_code
             , acct_nbr
             , currency_name) a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部') and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
left join s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name c on b.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
left join (
select acct_nbr
     , max(max_div_date) as max_div_date
     , sum(div_amt_twd) as div_amt_twd
     , sum(accu_div_amt_twd) as accu_div_amt_twd
from
(
select a.acct_nbr
     , a.div_date as max_div_date
     , rank() over (partition by a.acct_nbr order by a.div_date desc nulls last) as rk
     , a.div_amt_twd
     , a.accu_div_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_at_div a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部') and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '200'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '230'
)
where 1=1
and rk = 1
group by acct_nbr
) d on a.acct_nbr = d.acct_nbr
where 1=1
order by b.branch_name, b.sales_name
;

需求.需求摘要: 找出臺南分公司去年離退營業員移轉的客戶
篩選條件: 離退營業員移轉的客戶

SQL.內容:
with base as (
select a.prod_type_code
     , a.prod_type_desc
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.party_id
     , a.party_id_mask
     , b.party_name
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , a.area_code
     , a.area_name
     , a.branch_code
     , a.branch_name
     , a.nw_segment_desc
     , row_number() over(partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.prod_type_code) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select b.party_id_mask
                , a.party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.prod_type_code = '100'
           group by b.party_id_mask
                  , a.party_name
           ) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '台南分公司'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.sales_nbr = 'A01'
)
, txn as (
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(a.txn_amt_twd)/count(distinct a.snap_yyyymm) as txn_amt_twd_mavg
     , max(a.last_txn_date) as last_txn_date
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '台南分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202410' and '202503'
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '110'
group by b.party_id_mask
)
, rev as (
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('111R01','111R02','112R01','113R01','151R01','161R01','181R01','3C1R01','3F1R01','3P1R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_經紀
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('121R01','211R01','221R01','231R01','241R01','421R01','421R02','541R01','6L1R02','6L1R03') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_財管
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('111R01','111R02') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_台股
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('112R01','113R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_信用
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('151R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_借券
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('161R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_不限用途
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('3C1R01','3F1R01','3P1R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_期權
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('211R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_海外股
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('231R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_海外債
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('121R01','221R01','421R01','421R02') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_基金
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '台南分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202410' and '202503'
group by b.party_id_mask
)
, inv as (
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '110' then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_台股
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_海外股
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_海外債
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_基金
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('150') then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_借券
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('160') then a.urul_loan_bal_amt end) as urul_loan_bal_amt_不限用途
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '台南分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202503'
group by b.party_id_mask
)
, 總表 as (
select a.area_name as 區部
     , a.branch_code as 分公司代號
     , a.branch_name as 分公司
     , a.sales_name as 營業員
     , a.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , a.emp_nbr as 員編
     , a.prod_type_desc as 帳戶別
     , a.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , a.party_id_mask as 客戶ID遮罩
     , a.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.nw_segment_desc as 客群整合
     , case when a.nw_segment_desc in ('富裕一般','富裕PIOSU','價值Plus','價值一般','價值新戶') then 'Y' else 'N' end as 是否核客
--     , a.rn
     , round(b.txn_amt_twd_mavg,0) as 近半年月均台股交易量
     , round(c.rev_amt_twd_經紀,0) as 近半年經紀貢獻
     , round(c.rev_amt_twd_財管,0) as 近半年財管貢獻
     , b.last_txn_date as 台股最後交易日
     , d.bal_amt_twd_台股 as "2025/3月底台股庫存"
     , d.bal_amt_twd_借券 as "2025/3月底借券庫存"
     , d.urul_loan_bal_amt_不限用途 as "2025/3月底不限用途餘額"
     , d.bal_amt_twd_海外股 as "2025/3月底海外股庫存"
     , d.bal_amt_twd_海外債 as "2025/3月底海外債庫存"
     , d.bal_amt_twd_基金 as "2025/3月底基金庫存"
     , c.rev_amt_twd_台股 as 近半年台股貢獻
     , c.rev_amt_twd_信用 as 近半年信用貢獻
     , c.rev_amt_twd_借券 as 近半年借券貢獻
     , c.rev_amt_twd_不限用途 as 近半年不限用途貢獻
     , c.rev_amt_twd_期權 as 近半年期權貢獻
     , c.rev_amt_twd_海外股 as 近半年海外股貢獻
     , c.rev_amt_twd_海外債 as 近半年海外債貢獻
     , c.rev_amt_twd_基金 as 近半年基金貢獻
from base a
left join txn b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
left join rev c on a.party_id_mask = c.party_id_mask
left join inv d on a.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.rn = 1
)
select *
from 總表 a
;

業務場景.業務場景: 人員異動與客戶移轉管理
業務場景.分類理由: 需求核心是鎖定「去年離退營業員」所引發的客戶移轉，並以分公司（臺南）為範圍產出移轉客戶名單與移轉後交易/貢獻等追蹤欄位，符合人員異動與客戶移轉管理場景。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選

需求.需求摘要: 擷取南一區與南二區2025年有實動境內ELN及FCN產品的有效台幣衍生性帳戶合格戶數最新數據
篩選條件: 帳戶類型為有效台幣衍生性帳戶
需求.其他備註: 需求數據為最新版本，且格式需與先前提供資料相同，並以每間分公司為單位呈現。密碼為66180。

SQL.內容:
select a.acct_nbr as 客戶編號
     , b.party_name as 客戶全名
     , a.open_date as 開戶日期
     , case when d.pro_cust = '1' then '1.一般-法人'
            when d.pro_cust = '2' then '2.一般-自然人'
            when d.pro_cust = '4' then '4.專業-法人或基金'
            when d.pro_cust = '6' then '6.專業-自然人'
            end as 客戶類別
     , a.branch_code||'-富邦-'||replace(a.branch_name,'分公司') as 分公司
     , a.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , d.sr as 未交割金額上限
     , case when d.status = '1' then '1:正常'
            when d.status = '2' then '2:暫停'
            when d.status = '3' then '3:銷戶'
            end as 客戶狀態
     , e.kyc_expiry_date as KYC到期日
     , a.pi_expiry_date as PI到期日
     , c.一般到期日
     , case when c.客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否 = 'Y' then '1.有' else '2.無' end as 客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否
     , e.age as 年齡
     , case when c.境內衍生性商品高齡投資人聲明書 = 'Y' then '1.有' else '2.無' end as 境內衍生性商品高齡投資人聲明書
     , case when a.f_pi_sign_flag = 'Y' then '專業' else '一般' end as 客戶屬性
     , case when g.emp_flag = 'Y' then 'Y' else 'N' end as 員工
     , e.kyc_risk_desc as KYC
     , h.acct_nbr as 集保帳號
     , a.nw_segment_desc as 客戶標籤
     , case when c."客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否(本幣)" = 'Y' then '1.有' else '2.無' end as "客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否(本幣)"
     , case when c."客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否(外幣)" = 'Y' then '1.有' else '2.無' end as "客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否(外幣)"
     , a.area_name as 區部
     , case when i.ELN = 'Y' then 'Y' else 'N' end as "2025有實動境內ELN"
     , case when i.FCN = 'Y' then 'Y' else 'N' end as "2025有實動境內FCN"
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select b.party_id_mask
                , a.party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.prod_type_code = '100'
           group by b.party_id_mask, a.party_name
) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
left join (select b.acct_nbr as 帳號
                , max(case when a.contract_seq in ('85') then edate end) as 一般到期日
                , max(case when a.contract_seq in ('50','85') then 'Y' else 'N' end) as 客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否
                , max(case when a.contract_seq in ('50') then 'Y' else 'N' end) as "客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否(本幣)"
                , max(case when a.contract_seq in ('85') then 'Y' else 'N' end) as "客戶同意行銷結構型商品聲明書簽屬與否(外幣)"
                , max(case when a.contract_seq in ('83') then 'Y' else 'N' end) as 境內衍生性商品高齡投資人聲明書
           from dm_s_view.ns_com_cus_signcta a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.cus_id = b.acct_nbr and b.prod_type_code = '500' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
           where 1=1
           and a.contract_seq in ('50','83','85')
           and (a.edate = to_date('99991231','YYYYMMDD') or a.edate > current_date-1)
           group by b.acct_nbr) c on a.acct_nbr = c.帳號
left join dm_s_view.ns_com_customer d on a.acct_nbr = d.cus_id
left join dm_s_view.m_ac_account_info e on a.prod_type_code = e.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = e.acct_nbr
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_customer f on a.party_id = f.party_id
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_employee g on a.party_id = g.party_id and g.emp_flag = 'Y'
left join (select branch_code
                , party_id
                , acct_nbr
                , row_number() over (partition by party_id order by last_txn_date desc nulls last) as rn
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
           where 1=1
           and prod_type_code = '100'
           and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
           and close_reason_code <> '011'
           and area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部')) h on a.branch_code = h.branch_code and a.party_id = h.party_id and h.rn = 1
left join (select acct_nbr
                , max(case when prod_stype_desc = 'ELN' then 'Y' else 'N' end) as ELN
                , max(case when prod_stype_desc = 'FCN' then 'Y' else 'N' end) as FCN
           from dm_s_view.m_at_sn_txn
           where 1=1
           and prod_type_code = '500'
           and substr(txn_yyyymm,1,4) = '2025'
           and prod_stype_desc in ('ELN','FCN')
           group by acct_nbr) i on a.acct_nbr = i.acct_nbr
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '500'
and a.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部')

業務場景.業務場景: 精準行銷與專案名單篩選
業務場景.分類理由: 需求以「有效台幣衍生性帳戶資格」搭配「2025年境內ELN/FCN有實動」與區域條件進行合格戶數圈選，屬多條件資格篩選的專案型名單/統計。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選

需求.需求摘要: 查詢斗六價值PLUS客群客戶的最新數據（包含合計值）及營業員價值PLUS客戶滲透率，並要求更新已離職員工劉秉樺所屬客戶的營業員資料。
需求.其他備註: 客戶名單依附檔提供。希望Q2期間每週四更新數據。

SQL.內容:
--需求1.
select a.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , c.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , a.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.age as 年齡
     , round(nvl(d.me_asset_amt_twd,0),0) as 總資產
     , a.kyc_risk_desc as kyc風險等級
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fs,0),0) as 海外股成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fb,0),0) as 海外債成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_l,0),0) as 壽險成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fund,0),0) as 基金成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_sn,0),0) as 結構型成交金額
     , round(nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fs,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fb,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_l,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_fund,0) + nvl(b.txn_amt_twd_sn,0),0) as 總財管成交金額
from
(
select a.party_id_mask
     , a.branch_name
     , a.nw_segment_desc
     , c.age
     , c.kyc_risk_desc
     , max(b.party_name) as party_name
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.prod_type_code = '100'
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_customer c on a.party_id = c.party_id
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '斗六分公司'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
group by a.party_id_mask
       , a.branch_name
       , a.nw_segment_desc
       , c.age
       , c.kyc_risk_desc
) a
left join
(
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fs
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fb
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fund
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_sn
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '6L0' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_l
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '斗六分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by b.party_id_mask
) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
left join
(
select party_id_mask
     , sales_name
     , prod_type_code
     , row_number() over (partition by party_id_mask order by prod_type_code, last_txn_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
where 1=1
and branch_name = '斗六分公司'
and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
) c on a.party_id_mask = c.party_id_mask and c.rn = 1
left join
(
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(a.me_asset_amt_twd) as me_asset_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_asset a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '斗六分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202504'
group by b.party_id_mask
) d on a.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
;
--需求2.
select a.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , c.sales_name as 營業員姓名
--     , a.nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
--     , a.party_name as 客戶姓名
--     , a.age as 年齡
--     , round(nvl(d.me_asset_amt_twd,0),0) as 總資產
--     , a.kyc_risk_desc as kyc風險等級
     , count(distinct a.party_id_mask) as 價值Plus客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_fs > 0 then a.party_id_mask end) as 海外股成交客戶人數
     , round(count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_fs > 0 then a.party_id_mask end)/count(distinct a.party_id_mask),2) as 價值Plus客戶海外股滲透率
     , count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_fb > 0 then a.party_id_mask end) as 海外債成交客戶人數
     , round(count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_fb > 0 then a.party_id_mask end)/count(distinct a.party_id_mask),2) as 價值Plus客戶海外債滲透率
     , count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_l > 0 then a.party_id_mask end) as 壽險成交客戶人數
     , round(count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_l > 0 then a.party_id_mask end)/count(distinct a.party_id_mask),2) as 價值Plus客戶壽險滲透率
     , count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_fund > 0 then a.party_id_mask end) as 基金成交客戶人數
     , round(count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_fund > 0 then a.party_id_mask end)/count(distinct a.party_id_mask),2) as 價值Plus客戶基金滲透率
     , count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_sn > 0 then a.party_id_mask end) as 結構型成交客戶人數
     , round(count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_sn > 0 then a.party_id_mask end)/count(distinct a.party_id_mask),2) as 價值Plus客戶結構型滲透率
     , count(distinct case when b.txn_amt_twd_fs > 0 or b.txn_amt_twd_fb > 0 or b.txn_amt_twd_l > 0 or b.txn_amt_twd_fund > 0 or b.txn_amt_twd_sn > 0 then a.party_id_mask end) as 總財管成交客戶人數
from
(
select a.party_id_mask
     , a.branch_name
     , a.nw_segment_desc
     , c.age
     , c.kyc_risk_desc
     , max(b.party_name) as party_name
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.prod_type_code = '100'
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_customer c on a.party_id = c.party_id
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '斗六分公司'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
group by a.party_id_mask
       , a.branch_name
       , a.nw_segment_desc
       , c.age
       , c.kyc_risk_desc
) a
left join
(
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fs
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fb
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_fund
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_sn
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '6L0' then a.txn_amt_twd end) as txn_amt_twd_l
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '斗六分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by b.party_id_mask
) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
left join
(
select party_id_mask
     , sales_name
     , prod_type_code
     , row_number() over (partition by party_id_mask order by prod_type_code, last_txn_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
where 1=1
and branch_name = '斗六分公司'
and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
) c on a.party_id_mask = c.party_id_mask and c.rn = 1
left join
(
select b.party_id_mask
     , sum(a.me_asset_amt_twd) as me_asset_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_asset a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '斗六分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202504'
group by b.party_id_mask
) d on a.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
group by a.branch_name
       , c.sales_name
;

業務場景.業務場景: 精準行銷與專案名單篩選
業務場景.分類理由: 此 SQL 報表的核心目的在於統計斗六分公司「價值Plus」客群在海外股、海外債、基金、壽險、結構型等五項財管商品的成交人數、總成交金額及滲透率。這完全符合「財管商品業績與例行月報」中以五項商品 KPI、實動戶與貢獻度為核心的分類特徵。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選
人員異動與客戶移轉管理

業務場景.gemini審查意見: 原標籤「人員異動與客戶移轉管理」不適當，因為雖然需求摘要提及離職員工資料更新，但 SQL 實作內容的主體是進行商品成交實動率與滲透率的績效統計，並非追蹤客戶移轉前後的業績銜接或流向，建議更換為績效管理類的標籤。
業務場景.原始標籤: 人員異動與客戶移轉管理
業務場景.openai複審理由: 本案需求核心是針對「斗六價值PLUS客群」產出客戶層級最新清單與彙總指標（價值PLUS戶數、實動戶數、滲透率），並帶出五項商品成交金額等欄位，屬於依特定客群/條件圈選名單後做資格/實動統計的典型「名單篩選＋專案統計」場景。Gemini 所提「財管商品業績與例行月報」通常以區域/月報期間/YTD為主軸，輸出管理層例行KPI（銷量/收入/貢獻等）且偏彙總報表；本SQL片段明顯以客戶明細（客戶姓名、年齡、資產、KYC、各商品成交金額）為主，較不像例行月報。至於原標籤「人員異動與客戶移轉管理」，雖提到要更新離職員工客戶的營業員資料，但未呈現移轉前後銜接追蹤、原/新營業員對照、移轉日期或移轉後表現等移轉管理分析主體，因此不適合作為主要標籤。綜合判斷，改用「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」最貼近本案主體。
業務場景.審查狀態: 建議第三標籤🔍需人工確認

需求.需求摘要: 調閱北高雄價值PLUS客群的相關資料，了解其財管庫存及目前的損益
需求.其他備註: 總公司已有另外提供關於實動戶狀況

SQL.內容:
with base as (
select a.party_id
     , a.party_id_mask
     , b.party_name
     , a.nw_segment_desc
     , c.age
     , c.kyc_risk_desc
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask
                , a.party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b
             on b.prod_type_code = '100'
            and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_customer c on a.party_id = c.party_id
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '北高雄'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
group by a.party_id
       , a.party_id_mask
       , b.party_name
       , a.nw_segment_desc
       , c.age
       , c.kyc_risk_desc
)
, inv as (
select a.party_id
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_fs
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then a.benefit_amt_twd end) as benefit_amt_twd_fs
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_fund
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.benefit_amt_twd end) as benefit_amt_twd_fund
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_fb
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then a.benefit_amt_twd end) as benefit_amt_twd_fb
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then a.bal_amt_twd end) as bal_amt_twd_sn
     , sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then a.benefit_amt_twd end) as benefit_amt_twd_sn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '北高雄' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and b.nw_segment_desc = '價值Plus'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202504'
group by a.party_id
)
, ins as (
select party_id 
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd_l
from dm_s_view.m_at_insurance_txn
where 1=1
and branch_name = '北高雄'
and prod_type_code = '600'
and prod_mtype_code = '6L0'
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
and policy_status_desc in ('進件','已核保')
group by party_id
)
, fs as (
select party_id
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd_fs
from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn
where 1=1
and branch_name = '北高雄'
and prod_type_code = '200'
and prod_mtype_code = '210'
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by party_id
)
, fb as (
select party_id
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd_fb
from dm_s_view.m_at_bond_txn
where 1=1
and branch_name = '北高雄'
and prod_type_code = '200'
and prod_mtype_code = '230'
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by party_id
)
, fund as (
select party_id
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd_fund
from dm_s_view.m_at_fund_txn
where 1=1
and branch_name = '北高雄'
and prod_type_code in ('100','200','400')
and prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420')
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by party_id
)
, sn as (
select party_id
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd_sn
from dm_s_view.m_at_sn_txn
where 1=1
and branch_name = '北高雄'
and prod_type_code in ('200','500')
and prod_mtype_code in ('240','540')
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by party_id
)
select c.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , c.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , c.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , c.acct_nbr as "客戶台股帳號(如無台股帳號則為複委託帳號)"
     , a.nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , a.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.age as 客戶年齡
     , a.kyc_risk_desc as KYC風險等級
     , e.txn_amt_twd_fs as "海外股成交金額_2025(截至04/17)"
     , f.txn_amt_twd_fb as "海外債成交金額_2025(截至04/17)"
     , g.txn_amt_twd_fund as "基金成交金額_2025(截至04/17)"
     , h.txn_amt_twd_sn as "結構型成交金額_2025(截至04/17)"
     , d.txn_amt_twd_l as "壽險成交金額_2025(截至04/17)"
     , nvl(e.txn_amt_twd_fs,0) + nvl(f.txn_amt_twd_fb,0) + nvl(g.txn_amt_twd_fund,0) + nvl(h.txn_amt_twd_sn,0) + nvl(d.txn_amt_twd_l,0) as "總財管成交金額_2025(截至04/17)"
--     , round(b.bal_amt_twd_fs,0) as 海外股庫存金額_20250417
--     , round(b.benefit_amt_twd_fs,0) as 海外股未實現損益金額_20250417
--     , round(b.bal_amt_twd_fund,0) as 基金庫存金額_20250417
--     , round(b.benefit_amt_twd_fund,0) as 基金未實現損益金額_20250417
--     , round(b.bal_amt_twd_fb,0) as 海外債庫存金額_20250417
--     , round(b.benefit_amt_twd_fb,0) as 海外債未實現損益金額_20250417
--     , round(b.bal_amt_twd_sn,0) as 結構型庫存金額_20250417
--     , round(b.benefit_amt_twd_sn,0) as 結構型未實現損益金額_20250417
     , round(nvl(b.bal_amt_twd_fs,0) + nvl(b.bal_amt_twd_fund,0) + nvl(b.benefit_amt_twd_fb,0) + nvl(b.benefit_amt_twd_sn,0),0) as "財管庫存金額(不含壽險)_2025/04/17"
--     , round(nvl(b.benefit_amt_twd_fs,0) + nvl(b.benefit_amt_twd_fund,0) + nvl(b.benefit_amt_twd_fb,0) + nvl(b.benefit_amt_twd_sn,0),0) as "財管未實現損益金額(不含壽險)_20250417"
--     , round(d.txn_amt_twd,0) as 壽險現存有效保單核保保費金額_20250417
from base a
left join inv b on a.party_id = b.party_id
left join (select party_id
                , acct_nbr
                , emp_nbr
                , sales_nbr
                , sales_name
                , row_number() over (partition by party_id order by prod_type_code, last_txn_date desc nulls last, open_date desc nulls last) as rn
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
           where 1=1
           and branch_name = '北高雄'
           and acct_valid_flag = 'Y') c on a.party_id = c.party_id and c.rn = 1
left join ins d on a.party_id = d.party_id
left join fs e on a.party_id = e.party_id
left join fb f on a.party_id = f.party_id
left join fund g on a.party_id = g.party_id
left join sn h on a.party_id = h.party_id

SQL.內容:
select a.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , a.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
