需求.需求摘要: 查詢離職營業員的期貨客戶名單
欄位: 離職營業員期貨客戶名單
篩選條件: 營業員姓名:傅美惠, 營業員編號:023, 員工編號:009177
營業員姓名:鍾穎華, 營業員編號:031, 員工編號:009460
營業員姓名:楊秀琴, 營業員編號:006, 員工編號:010175
營業員姓名:黃智胤, 營業員編號:068, 員工編號:010025

SQL.內容:
/* 名下帳戶 */
WITH 名下帳戶 AS (
SELECT
    '名下帳戶' AS TYPE_,
    ACCT_NBR,
    EMP_NBR,
    SALES_NBR,
    SALES_NAME
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
WHERE
    (ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '300' -- 期貨
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '961N' -- 青埔分公司
    AND EMP_NBR IN ('009177', '009460', '010175', '010025') -- 傅美惠, 鍾穎華, 楊秀琴, 黃智胤
),

過往交易 AS (
SELECT
    '過往交易' AS TYPE_,
    ACCT_NBR,
    MAX(EMP_NBR) AS EMP_NBR,
    MAX(SALES_NBR) AS SALES_NBR,
    MAX(SALES_NAME) AS SALES_NAME
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUTURE_TXN
WHERE
    BRANCH_CODE = '961N' -- 青埔分公司
    AND EMP_NBR IN ('009177', '009460', '010175', '010025') -- 傅美惠, 鍾穎華, 楊秀琴, 黃智胤
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
),

移轉紀錄 AS (
SELECT
    '移轉紀錄' AS TYPE_,
    ACCT_NBR,
    MAX(舊營業員員編) AS EMP_NBR,
    MAX(舊營業員代碼) AS SALES_NBR,
    MAX(舊營業員姓名) AS SALES_NAME
FROM
    (
    SELECT 
        ACC.ACCT_NBR,
        ACC.PARTY_ID,
        SUBSTR(CUCG.OFIELS, 1, 3) AS 舊營業員代碼,
        '0'||SLAB_B.EMNO AS 舊營業員員編,
        SLAB_B.NAME AS 舊營業員姓名,
        SUBSTR(CUCG.NFIELD, 1, 3) AS 新營業員代碼,
        '0'||SLAB_C.EMNO AS 新營業員員編,
        SLAB_C.NAME AS 新營業員姓名,
        CUCG.TDATE AS 移轉日,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUCG.OFIELS, ACC.ACCT_NBR ORDER BY CUCG.TDATE DESC NULLS LAST) AS 順序
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.CUCG CUCG
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.SLAB_DAY SLAB_B
        ON CUCG.TDATE = SLAB_B.SNAP_DATE AND SUBSTR(CUCG.ACNO, 1, 4) = SLAB_B.BHNO AND CUCG.OFIELS = SLAB_B.SALE -- 取得舊營業員資訊
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.SLAB_DAY SLAB_C
        ON CUCG.TDATE = SLAB_C.SNAP_DATE AND SUBSTR(CUCG.ACNO, 1, 4) = SLAB_C.BHNO AND CUCG.NFIELD = SLAB_C.SALE -- 取得新營業員資訊
    LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
        ON CUCG.ACNO = SUBSTR(ACC.ACCT_NBR, 1, 10) AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
    WHERE
        CUCG.FLNO = '0018' -- 移轉營業員
        AND SUBSTR(CUCG.ACNO, 1, 4) = '961N' -- 樹林分公司
        AND '0'||SLAB_B.EMNO IN ('009177', '009460', '010175', '010025') -- 傅美惠, 鍾穎華, 楊秀琴, 黃智胤
    ) 
WHERE
    順序 = 1
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
)

/* RESULT */
SELECT
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 期貨帳戶,
    ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR AS 現貨帳戶,
    PARTY_NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    CASE WHEN 名下帳戶.TYPE_ = '名下帳戶' THEN '名下帳戶'
         WHEN 過往交易.TYPE_ = '過往交易' THEN '過往交易'
         WHEN 移轉紀錄.TYPE_ = '移轉紀錄' THEN '移轉紀錄'
         ELSE NULL END AS 類型, 
    CASE WHEN 名下帳戶.TYPE_ = '名下帳戶' THEN ACC.EMP_NBR
         WHEN 過往交易.TYPE_ = '過往交易' THEN 過往交易.EMP_NBR
         WHEN 移轉紀錄.TYPE_ = '移轉紀錄' THEN 移轉紀錄.EMP_NBR
         ELSE NULL END AS 前任_營業員員編,
    CASE WHEN 名下帳戶.TYPE_ = '名下帳戶' THEN TO_CHAR(ACC.SALES_NBR)
         WHEN 過往交易.TYPE_ = '過往交易' THEN TO_CHAR(過往交易.SALES_NBR)
         WHEN 移轉紀錄.TYPE_ = '移轉紀錄' THEN TO_CHAR(移轉紀錄.SALES_NBR)
         ELSE NULL END AS 前任_營業員代碼, 
    CASE WHEN 名下帳戶.TYPE_ = '名下帳戶' THEN ACC.SALES_NAME
         WHEN 過往交易.TYPE_ = '過往交易' THEN 過往交易.SALES_NAME
         WHEN 移轉紀錄.TYPE_ = '移轉紀錄' THEN 移轉紀錄.SALES_NAME
         ELSE NULL END AS 前任_營業員姓名, 
    ACC.EMP_NBR AS 現任_營業員員編,
    ACC.SALES_NBR AS 現任_營業員代碼,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 現任_營業員姓名
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME ON PARTY_NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    名下帳戶 ON 名下帳戶.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    過往交易 ON 過往交易.ACCT_NBR = ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    移轉紀錄 ON 移轉紀錄.ACCT_NBR = ACC.SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '300' -- 期貨
    AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '961N' -- 青埔分公司
    AND (名下帳戶.TYPE_ IS NOT NULL OR 過往交易.TYPE_ IS NOT NULL OR 移轉紀錄.TYPE_ IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY
    前任_營業員員編,
    類型
;

需求.需求摘要: 七賢需要更新促轉名單
篩選條件: 促轉名單 (客戶目前非北富銀交易，但擁有北富銀帳號)

SQL.內容:
select *
from dm_s_view.es_projectfile
where 1=1
and project_name like '%促轉%'
;

with base as (
select b.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , b.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , b.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , b.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , b.bank_desc as 交割銀行
     , c.rsd_city_name as 通訊地縣市
     , c.rsd_city_area as 通訊地區
     , d.acct_nbr as 複委託帳號
     , e.acct_nbr as 信託帳號
from dm_s_view.es_projectdata a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.acno = b.acct_nbr
left join dm_s_view.t_dr_acct c on c.snap_yyyymm = '202504' and b.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
left join (select party_id
                , acct_nbr
                , row_number() over(partition by party_id order by last_txn_date desc nulls last) as rn
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
           where 1=1
           and prod_type_code = '200'
           and branch_name = '七賢分公司'
           and acct_valid_flag = 'Y') d on b.party_id = d.party_id and d.rn = 1
left join (select party_id
                , acct_nbr
                , row_number() over(partition by party_id order by last_txn_date desc nulls last) as rn
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
           where 1=1
           and prod_type_code = '400'
           and branch_name = '七賢分公司'
           and acct_valid_flag = 'Y') e on b.party_id = e.party_id and e.rn = 1
where 1=1
and a.project_no = 'BANK2025H1'
and b.prod_type_code = '100'
and b.branch_name = '七賢分公司'
)
, txn as (
select acct_nbr
     , sum(case when txn_yyyymm between '202401' and '202412' then txn_amt_twd end) as e_txn_amt_twd_113
     , sum(case when txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504' then txn_amt_twd end) as e_txn_amt_twd_114
from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202401' and '202504'
and prod_type_code = '100'
and prod_mtype_code = '110'
and channel_code = '001'
group by acct_nbr
)
, inv as (
select acct_nbr
     , sum(bal_amt_twd) as bal_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory
where 1=1
and snap_yyyymm = '202504'
and prod_type_code = '100'
and prod_mtype_code = '110'
group by acct_nbr
)
select a.客戶帳號
     , a.營業員員編
     , a.營業員代碼
     , a.營業員姓名
     , b.e_txn_amt_twd_113 as "113年證券電子下單交易量"
     , b.e_txn_amt_twd_114 as "114年證券電子下單交易量"
     , c.bal_amt_twd as 證券庫存金額
     , a.交割銀行
     , a.通訊地縣市
     , a.通訊地區
     , a.複委託帳號
     , a.信託帳號
from base a
left join txn b on a.客戶帳號 = b.acct_nbr
left join inv c on a.客戶帳號 = c.acct_nbr
;

需求.需求摘要: 取得ABC客戶三四月份交易統計
篩選條件: 交易月份為三月及四月

SQL.內容:
WITH TXN AS (
SELECT
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TXN_YYYYMM = '202503' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS 交易量MAR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TXN_YYYYMM = '202504' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS 交易量APR
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
WHERE
    PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
    AND TXN_YYYYMM IN ('202503', '202504')
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
)

SELECT
    ACC.AREA_NAME AS 區部,
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號 AS 經紀客群,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名,
    NVL(TXN.交易量MAR, 0) AS 交易量MAR,
    NVL(TXN.交易量APR, 0) AS 交易量APR
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    TXN ON TXN.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
    AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
    AND SUBSTR(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 1, 1) IN ('A', 'B', 'C') -- 經紀客群ABC
ORDER BY
    ACC.EMP_NBR,
    經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號
;

需求.需求摘要: 七賢分公司信託基金客戶庫存名單
需求.其他備註: 依照證券營業員別，切好獨立檔案

SQL.內容:
with wm_base as (
select a.party_id
     , a.party_id_mask
     , b.party_name
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.sales_name
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select b.party_id_mask
                , a.party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.prod_type_code = '100'
           group by b.party_id_mask, a.party_name
           ) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '七賢分公司'
and a.prod_type_code = '400'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
)
, inv as (
select a.acct_nbr
     , c.prod_code
     , c.prod_full_name
     , a.net_cost_amt_twd
     , a.bal_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.branch_name = '七賢分公司'
                                   and b.prod_type_code = '400'
                                   and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
                                   and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
inner join dm_s_view.m_rf_fund c on c.prod_type_code = '400' and c.prod_mtype_code = '420' and a.inve_prod_id = c.fund_prod_id
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202504'
and a.prod_type_code = '400'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '420'
and a.bal_amt_twd > 0
)
, ts_base as (
select a.party_id
     , a.party_id_mask
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '七賢分公司'
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
)
select c.acct_nbr as 客戶證券帳號
     , c.emp_nbr as 客戶證券營業員員編
     , c.sales_name as 客戶證券營業員姓名
     , a.acct_nbr as 客戶信託帳號
     , a.emp_nbr as 客戶信託營業員員編
     , a.sales_name as 客戶信託營業員姓名
     , a.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , b.prod_code as 庫存標的代碼
     , b.prod_full_name as 庫存標的名稱
     , round(b.net_cost_amt_twd,0) as 庫存成本
     , round(b.bal_amt_twd,0) as 庫存市值
from wm_base a
inner join inv b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
left join ts_base c on a.party_id_mask = c.party_id_mask and c.rn = 1

需求.需求摘要: 114年新開戶交易累計500萬以上客戶

SQL.檔名: 板橋分公司例行性報表 - 新開戶500萬.sql
SQL.內容:
/* 2025新開戶有效戶 */
WITH NEW_OPEN_ACC AS (
SELECT
    ACC.ACCT_NBR,
    ACC.OPEN_DATE,
    ACC.SALES_NAME,
    PARTY_NAME.PARTY_NAME
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME ON PARTY_NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.OPEN_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('2025-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2025-12-31')
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股帳戶
    AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
),

/* 2025新開戶有效戶交易量 */
NEW_OPEN_TXN AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        TXN.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳戶,
        NVL(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, '2025YTD') AS YYYYMM,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN TXN
    INNER JOIN
        NEW_OPEN_ACC ON NEW_OPEN_ACC.ACCT_NBR = TXN.ACCT_NBR
    WHERE
        TXN.TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
        AND TXN.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股帳戶
        AND TXN.BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
    GROUP BY
        TXN.ACCT_NBR,
        CUBE(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM)
    )
PIVOT (MAX(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "JAN", '202502' AS "FEB", '202503' AS "MAR",
                                       '202504' AS "APR", '202505' AS "MAY", '202506' AS "JUN",
                                       '202507' AS "JUL", '202508' AS "AUG", '202509' AS "SEP",
                                       '202510' AS "OCT", '202511' AS "NOV", '202512' AS "DEC",
                                       '2025YTD' AS "2025YTD"))
)

SELECT
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員,
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.OPEN_DATE AS 開戶日期,
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    NEW_OPEN_TXN.*
FROM
    NEW_OPEN_ACC
INNER JOIN
    NEW_OPEN_TXN ON NEW_OPEN_ACC.ACCT_NBR = NEW_OPEN_TXN.客戶帳戶
WHERE
    NEW_OPEN_TXN."2025YTD" >= 5000000
ORDER BY
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.SALES_NAME,
    NEW_OPEN_TXN.客戶帳戶
;

SQL.內容:
select b.area_name as 區部名稱

     , b.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , b.emp_nbr as 財管信託營業員員編

     , e.sales_name as 台股營業員姓名
     , e.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , round(f.me_asset_amt_twd,0) as 全商品庫存現值
     , c.prod_code as 庫存基金代碼
     , c.prod_full_name as 庫存基金名稱
     , round(a.net_cost_amt_twd,0) as 庫存基金成本
     , round(a.bal_amt_twd,0) as 庫存基金現值
     , a.benefit_ratio as "庫存基金報酬率(%)"
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code
                                   and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
                                   and b.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部')
                                   and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
inner join dm_s_view.m_rf_fund c on a.inve_prod_id = c.fund_prod_id
                                and a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code
                                and c.fund_status_code = '001'
                                and (c.prod_full_name like '%群益%' or c.prod_full_name like '%統一%')
left join (select b.party_id_mask, a.party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.prod_type_code = '100'
           group by b.party_id_mask, a.party_name) d on b.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
left join (select branch_code
                , party_id_mask
                , acct_nbr
                , emp_nbr
                , sales_name
                , row_number() over (partition by branch_code, party_id_mask order by last_txn_date desc nulls last, open_date desc nulls last) as rn
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
           where 1=1
           and prod_type_code = '100'
           and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
           and area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部')
           ) e on e.rn = 1
              and b.branch_code = e.branch_code
              and b.party_id_mask = e.party_id_mask
left join (select b.branch_code
                , b.party_id_mask
                , sum(a.me_asset_amt_twd) as me_asset_amt_twd
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_asset a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
           where 1=1
           and a.snap_yyyymm = '202504'
           group by b.branch_code
                  , b.party_id_mask
           ) f on b.branch_code = f.branch_code
              and b.party_id_mask = f.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202504'
and a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420')
order by b.area_name
       , b.branch_code
       , b.emp_nbr
       , c.prod_code
;

業務場景.業務場景: 庫存與損益明細報表
業務場景.分類理由: 需求以特定基金（群益、統一台股基金）之客戶持倉庫存為核心，輸出成本/現值/報酬率等庫存與損益明細欄位，屬於庫存狀態與損益明細查詢。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選
人員異動與客戶移轉管理

需求.需求摘要: 查詢台東-蘇育徵和高雄-許吳秀婷兩位營業員在2023至2024年每月的五項財管成績列表
篩選條件: 營業員姓名: 蘇育徵
營業員姓名: 許吳秀婷

SQL.內容:
with base as (
select b.emp_nbr
     , b.sales_name
     , a.snap_yyyymm
     , case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('210') then 'fs'
            when a.prod_mtype_code in ('230') then 'fb'
            when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then 'fund'
            when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then 'sn'
            when a.prod_mtype_code in ('6L0') then 'l'
            end as prod
     , round(sum(txn_amt_twd),0) as txn_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_prod_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部') and b.sales_name in ('蘇育徵','許吳秀婷')
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202301' and '202412'
and a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','210','220','230','240','420','540','6L0')
group by b.emp_nbr
       , b.sales_name
       , a.snap_yyyymm
       , case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('210') then 'fs'
              when a.prod_mtype_code in ('230') then 'fb'
              when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then 'fund'
              when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then 'sn'
              when a.prod_mtype_code in ('6L0') then 'l'
              end
)
select emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , snap_yyyymm as 年月
     , nvl("'fs'",0) as 海外股交易金額
     , nvl("'fb'",0) as 海外債交易金額
     , nvl("'fund'",0) as 基金交易金額
     , nvl("'sn'",0) as 結構型商品交易金額
     , nvl("'l'",0) as 壽險交易金額
from base
pivot (
sum(txn_amt_twd)
for prod in ('fs','fb','fund','sn','l')
)
order by emp_nbr, snap_yyyymm
;

需求.需求摘要: 比較不同月份的現貨市佔率前20大客戶

SQL.內容:
--需求1
with base as (
select a.party_id
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202404
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202504
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202404
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202504
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm in ('202404','202504')
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '110'
group by a.party_id
)
, acct as (
select a.party_id
     , b.party_name
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
)
, base2 as (
select d.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , d.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , d.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.party_id as 客戶ID
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , d.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202404 as 現貨交易量_202404
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202504 as 現貨交易量_202504
     , a.rn_202404 as 排名_202404
     , a.rn_202504 as 排名_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as 市佔BPS_202404
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504,8) as 市佔BPS_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504 - a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base a
cross join (select sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20240430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202404
                 , sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20250401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202504
            from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
            where 1=1
            and market_info_code = '001'--台股交易量
            and market_code in ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
            and snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd')) b
left join acct d on a.party_id = d.party_id and d.rn = 1
)
select
       a.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202404
     , a.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202404
     , a.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202404
     , a.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202404
     , a.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202404
     , a.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202404
     , a.現貨交易量_202404
     , a.市佔BPS_202404
     , a."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202404"
     , a.排名_202404 as 排名
     , b.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202504
     , b.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202504
     , b.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202504
     , b.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202504
     , b.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202504
     , b.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202504
     , b.現貨交易量_202504
     , b.市佔BPS_202504
     , b."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202504"
from
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202404, 排名_202404, 市佔BPS_202404, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202404 between 1 and 20
) a
inner join
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202504, 排名_202504, 市佔BPS_202504, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202504 between 1 and 20
) b
on a.排名_202404 = b.排名_202504
order by a.排名_202404
;
--需求2
with base as (
select a.party_id
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202404
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202504
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202404
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202504
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm in ('202404','202504')
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '110'
group by a.party_id
)
, acct as (
select a.party_id
     , b.party_name
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
)
, base2 as (
select d.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , d.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , d.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.party_id as 客戶ID
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , d.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202404 as 現貨交易量_202404
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202504 as 現貨交易量_202504
     , a.rn_202404 as 排名_202404
     , a.rn_202504 as 排名_202504
     , row_number() over (partition by d.emp_nbr order by a.rn_202404) as 排名_202404_依營業員
     , row_number() over (partition by d.emp_nbr order by a.rn_202504) as 排名_202504_依營業員
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as 市佔BPS_202404
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504,8) as 市佔BPS_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504 - a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base a
cross join (select sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20240430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202404
                 , sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20250401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202504
            from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
            where 1=1
            and market_info_code = '001'--台股交易量
            and market_code in ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
            and snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd')) b
left join acct d on a.party_id = d.party_id and d.rn = 1
)
select
       a.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202404
     , a.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202404
     , a.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202404
     , a.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202404
     , a.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202404
     , a.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202404
     , a.現貨交易量_202404
     , a.市佔BPS_202404
     , a."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202404"
     , a.排名_202404_依營業員 as 排名
     , b.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202504
     , b.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202504
     , b.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202504
     , b.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202504
     , b.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202504
     , b.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202504
     , b.現貨交易量_202504
     , b.市佔BPS_202504
     , b."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202504"
from
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202404, 排名_202404_依營業員, 市佔BPS_202404, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202404_依營業員 between 1 and 20
) a
inner join
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202504, 排名_202504_依營業員, 市佔BPS_202504, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202504_依營業員 between 1 and 20
) b
on a.排名_202404_依營業員 = b.排名_202504_依營業員 and a.營業員員編 = b.營業員員編
order by a.營業員代碼, a.排名_202404_依營業員
;
--需求2
with base as (
select a.prod_type_desc as 帳戶別
     , a.acct_nbr as 帳號
     , a.party_id_mask as 客戶ID
     , a.emp_nbr as 交易營業員員編
     , a.sales_nbr as 交易營業員代碼
     , case when a.sales_name = '李?芬' then '李酊' else a.sales_name end as 交易營業員姓名
     , '0'||b.emno as 開戶營業員員編
     , a.open_sales_nbr as 開戶營業員代碼
     , case when b.name = '李?芬' then '李酊' else b.name end as 開戶營業員姓名
     , nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.prod_type_code, a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join dm_s_view.slab_day b
    on a.open_date = b.snap_date and a.branch_code = b.bhno and a.open_sales_nbr = b.sale
inner join dm_s_view.m_pt_sales c on a.emp_nbr = c.emp_nbr and c.emp_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.prod_type_code in ('100','200','300','400','500')
and a.emp_nbr is not null
)
, rev as  (
select b.party_id_mask as 客戶ID
     , round(sum(a.rev_amt_twd)) as 財管貢獻
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202405' and '202504'
and a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','210','220','230','240','420','540','6L0')
group by b.party_id_mask
)
, base2 as (
select a.帳戶別
     , a.帳號
     , a.客戶ID
     , c.客戶姓名
     , a.交易營業員員編
     , a.交易營業員代碼
     , a.交易營業員姓名
     , a.開戶營業員員編
     , a.開戶營業員代碼
     , a.開戶營業員姓名
     , a.財管客群
     , nvl(b.財管貢獻,0) as 財管貢獻
from base a
left join rev b on a.客戶ID = b.客戶ID
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask as 客戶ID, a.party_name as 客戶姓名 from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) c on a.客戶ID = c.客戶ID
where 1=1
and a.rn = 1
)
--select *
--from base2
--;
select 交易營業員員編
     , 交易營業員姓名
     , count(distinct 客戶ID) as 客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 財管客群 in ('富裕一般','富裕PIOSU','價值Plus','價值一般','價值新戶') then 客戶ID end) as 核心客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 交易營業員代碼 = 'A01' then 客戶ID end) as A01客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when substr(交易營業員代碼,1,1) = 'B' then 客戶ID end) as BCODE客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 財管貢獻 < 1500 then 客戶ID end) as "202405-202504財管貢獻低於1500客戶人數"
from base2
group by 交易營業員員編, 交易營業員姓名
order by 交易營業員員編, 交易營業員姓名
;
--需求3
select emp_nbr
     , sales_name
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
where 1=1
and branch_name = '新營分公司'
and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and emp_nbr = '006237'
;
with txn as (
select emp_nbr
     , sales_name
     , acct_nbr
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
and prod_type_code = '100'
and prod_mtype_code = '110'
and emp_nbr = '006237'
and substr(transaction_id,-4,4) = 'CMIO'
group by emp_nbr
       , sales_name
       , acct_nbr
)
, market_txn as (
select sum(market_stock_txns) as market_txn_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
where 1=1
and market_info_code = '001'
and snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
)
, rev as (
select b.emp_nbr
     , b.acct_nbr
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('111R01','111R02') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_st
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('112R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_ml
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('161R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_loan
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and b.emp_nbr = '006237'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by b.emp_nbr, b.acct_nbr
)
select a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.txn_amt_twd as 現貨交易量
     , b.market_txn_amt_twd as 現貨市場交易量
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd,5) as "現貨市佔率(萬分之)"
     , c.rev_amt_twd_st as 現貨貢獻度
     , c.rev_amt_twd_ml as 融資貢獻度
     , c.rev_amt_twd_loan as 不限用途貢獻度
from txn a
cross join market_txn b
left join rev c on a.emp_nbr = c.emp_nbr and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
left join (select a.acct_nbr, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           ) d on a.acct_nbr = d.acct_nbr
order by "現貨市佔率(萬分之)" desc nulls last
;

業務場景.業務場景: 市佔率與交易排名分析
業務場景.分類理由: 需求以不同月份的現貨市佔率進行Top20客戶排名比較，核心即市佔率/交易量排行分析。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選
人員異動與客戶移轉管理

需求.需求摘要: 2025年4月與2024年4月現貨市佔率前20大客戶比較
篩選條件: 客戶類別: 現貨市佔率前20大

SQL.內容:
--需求1
with base as (
select a.party_id
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202404
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202504
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202404
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202504
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm in ('202404','202504')
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '110'
group by a.party_id
)
, acct as (
select a.party_id
     , b.party_name
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
)
, base2 as (
select d.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , d.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , d.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.party_id as 客戶ID
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , d.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202404 as 現貨交易量_202404
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202504 as 現貨交易量_202504
     , a.rn_202404 as 排名_202404
     , a.rn_202504 as 排名_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as 市佔BPS_202404
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504,8) as 市佔BPS_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504 - a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base a
cross join (select sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20240430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202404
                 , sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20250401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202504
            from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
            where 1=1
            and market_info_code = '001'--台股交易量
            and market_code in ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
            and snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd')) b
left join acct d on a.party_id = d.party_id and d.rn = 1
)
select
       a.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202404
     , a.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202404
     , a.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202404
     , a.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202404
     , a.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202404
     , a.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202404
     , a.現貨交易量_202404
     , a.市佔BPS_202404
     , a."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202404"
     , a.排名_202404 as 排名
     , b.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202504
     , b.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202504
     , b.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202504
     , b.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202504
     , b.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202504
     , b.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202504
     , b.現貨交易量_202504
     , b.市佔BPS_202504
     , b."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202504"
from
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202404, 排名_202404, 市佔BPS_202404, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202404 between 1 and 20
) a
inner join
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202504, 排名_202504, 市佔BPS_202504, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202504 between 1 and 20
) b
on a.排名_202404 = b.排名_202504
order by a.排名_202404
;
--需求2
with base as (
select a.party_id
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202404
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202504

from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a

where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm in ('202404','202504')

, acct as (

     , b.party_name
     , a.acct_nbr

     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1

, base2 as (
select d.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , d.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , d.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.party_id as 客戶ID
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , d.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202404 as 現貨交易量_202404
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202504 as 現貨交易量_202504
     , a.rn_202404 as 排名_202404
     , a.rn_202504 as 排名_202504
     , row_number() over (partition by d.emp_nbr order by a.rn_202404) as 排名_202404_依營業員
     , row_number() over (partition by d.emp_nbr order by a.rn_202504) as 排名_202504_依營業員
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as 市佔BPS_202404
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504,8) as 市佔BPS_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504 - a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base a
cross join (select sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20240430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202404
                 , sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20250401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202504
            from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
            where 1=1
            and market_info_code = '001'--台股交易量
            and market_code in ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
            and snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd')) b
left join acct d on a.party_id = d.party_id and d.rn = 1
)
select
       a.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202404
     , a.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202404
     , a.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202404
     , a.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202404
     , a.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202404
     , a.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202404
     , a.現貨交易量_202404
     , a.市佔BPS_202404
     , a."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202404"
     , a.排名_202404_依營業員 as 排名
     , b.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202504
     , b.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202504
     , b.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202504
     , b.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202504
     , b.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202504
     , b.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202504
     , b.現貨交易量_202504
     , b.市佔BPS_202504
     , b."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202504"
from
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202404, 排名_202404_依營業員, 市佔BPS_202404, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202404_依營業員 between 1 and 20
) a
inner join
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202504, 排名_202504_依營業員, 市佔BPS_202504, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2

order by a.營業員代碼, a.排名_202404_依營業員

--需求2
with base as (
select a.prod_type_desc as 帳戶別
     , a.acct_nbr as 帳號
     , a.party_id_mask as 客戶ID
     , a.emp_nbr as 交易營業員員編
     , a.sales_nbr as 交易營業員代碼
     , case when a.sales_name = '李?芬' then '李酊' else a.sales_name end as 交易營業員姓名
     , '0'||b.emno as 開戶營業員員編
     , a.open_sales_nbr as 開戶營業員代碼
     , case when b.name = '李?芬' then '李酊' else b.name end as 開戶營業員姓名
     , nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.prod_type_code, a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join dm_s_view.slab_day b
    on a.open_date = b.snap_date and a.branch_code = b.bhno and a.open_sales_nbr = b.sale
inner join dm_s_view.m_pt_sales c on a.emp_nbr = c.emp_nbr and c.emp_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.prod_type_code in ('100','200','300','400','500')
and a.emp_nbr is not null
)
, rev as  (
select b.party_id_mask as 客戶ID
     , round(sum(a.rev_amt_twd)) as 財管貢獻
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202405' and '202504'
and a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','210','220','230','240','420','540','6L0')
group by b.party_id_mask
)
, base2 as (
select a.帳戶別
     , a.帳號
     , a.客戶ID
     , c.客戶姓名
     , a.交易營業員員編
     , a.交易營業員代碼
     , a.交易營業員姓名
     , a.開戶營業員員編
     , a.開戶營業員代碼
     , a.開戶營業員姓名
     , a.財管客群
     , nvl(b.財管貢獻,0) as 財管貢獻
from base a
left join rev b on a.客戶ID = b.客戶ID
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask as 客戶ID, a.party_name as 客戶姓名 from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) c on a.客戶ID = c.客戶ID
where 1=1
and a.rn = 1
)
--select *
--from base2
--;
select 交易營業員員編
     , 交易營業員姓名
     , count(distinct 客戶ID) as 客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 財管客群 in ('富裕一般','富裕PIOSU','價值Plus','價值一般','價值新戶') then 客戶ID end) as 核心客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 交易營業員代碼 = 'A01' then 客戶ID end) as A01客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when substr(交易營業員代碼,1,1) = 'B' then 客戶ID end) as BCODE客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 財管貢獻 < 1500 then 客戶ID end) as "202405-202504財管貢獻低於1500客戶人數"
from base2
group by 交易營業員員編, 交易營業員姓名
order by 交易營業員員編, 交易營業員姓名
;
--需求3
select emp_nbr
     , sales_name
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
where 1=1
and branch_name = '新營分公司'
and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and emp_nbr = '006237'
;
with txn as (
select emp_nbr
     , sales_name
     , acct_nbr
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
and prod_type_code = '100'
and prod_mtype_code = '110'
and emp_nbr = '006237'
and substr(transaction_id,-4,4) = 'CMIO'
group by emp_nbr
       , sales_name
       , acct_nbr
)
, market_txn as (
select sum(market_stock_txns) as market_txn_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
where 1=1
and market_info_code = '001'
and snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
)
, rev as (
select b.emp_nbr
     , b.acct_nbr
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('111R01','111R02') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_st
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('112R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_ml
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('161R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_loan
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and b.emp_nbr = '006237'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by b.emp_nbr, b.acct_nbr
)
select a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.txn_amt_twd as 現貨交易量
     , b.market_txn_amt_twd as 現貨市場交易量
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd,5) as "現貨市佔率(萬分之)"
     , c.rev_amt_twd_st as 現貨貢獻度
     , c.rev_amt_twd_ml as 融資貢獻度
     , c.rev_amt_twd_loan as 不限用途貢獻度
from txn a
cross join market_txn b
left join rev c on a.emp_nbr = c.emp_nbr and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
left join (select a.acct_nbr, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           ) d on a.acct_nbr = d.acct_nbr
order by "現貨市佔率(萬分之)" desc nulls last
;

業務場景.業務場景: 市佔率與交易排名分析
業務場景.分類理由: 需求核心為指定月份現貨「市佔率前20大客戶」排行並比較兩期（2025/04 vs 2024/04），屬市佔率/排名分析情境。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選
人員異動與客戶移轉管理

需求.需求摘要: 比較2025年4月與2024年4月現貨市佔率前20大客戶
篩選條件: 現貨市佔率排名前20大客戶

SQL.內容:
--需求1
with base as (
select a.party_id
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202404
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202504
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202404
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202504
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm in ('202404','202504')
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '110'
group by a.party_id
)
, acct as (
select a.party_id
     , b.party_name
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
)
, base2 as (
select d.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , d.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , d.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.party_id as 客戶ID
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , d.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202404 as 現貨交易量_202404
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202504 as 現貨交易量_202504
     , a.rn_202404 as 排名_202404
     , a.rn_202504 as 排名_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as 市佔BPS_202404
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504,8) as 市佔BPS_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504 - a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base a
cross join (select sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20240430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202404
                 , sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20250401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202504
            from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
            where 1=1
            and market_info_code = '001'--台股交易量
            and market_code in ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
            and snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd')) b
left join acct d on a.party_id = d.party_id and d.rn = 1
)
select
       a.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202404
     , a.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202404
     , a.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202404
     , a.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202404
     , a.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202404
     , a.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202404
     , a.現貨交易量_202404
     , a.市佔BPS_202404
     , a."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202404"
     , a.排名_202404 as 排名
     , b.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202504
     , b.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202504
     , b.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202504
     , b.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202504
     , b.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202504
     , b.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202504
     , b.現貨交易量_202504
     , b.市佔BPS_202504
     , b."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202504"
from
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202404, 排名_202404, 市佔BPS_202404, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202404 between 1 and 20
) a
inner join
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202504, 排名_202504, 市佔BPS_202504, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202504 between 1 and 20
) b
on a.排名_202404 = b.排名_202504
order by a.排名_202404
;
--需求2
with base as (
select a.party_id
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202404
     , nvl(sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end),0) as txn_amt_twd_202504
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202404' and '202404' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202404
     , row_number() over (order by sum(case when a.snap_yyyymm between '202504' and '202504' then a.txn_amt_twd end) desc nulls last) as rn_202504
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm in ('202404','202504')
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '110'
group by a.party_id
)
, acct as (
select a.party_id
     , b.party_name
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '100'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
)
, base2 as (
select d.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , d.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , d.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.party_id as 客戶ID
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , d.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202404 as 現貨交易量_202404
     , a.txn_amt_twd_202504 as 現貨交易量_202504
     , a.rn_202404 as 排名_202404
     , a.rn_202504 as 排名_202504
     , row_number() over (partition by d.emp_nbr order by a.rn_202404) as 排名_202404_依營業員
     , row_number() over (partition by d.emp_nbr order by a.rn_202504) as 排名_202504_依營業員
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as 市佔BPS_202404
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504,8) as 市佔BPS_202504
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd_202504*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202504 - a.txn_amt_twd_202404*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd_202404,8) as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base a
cross join (select sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20240430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202404
                 , sum(case when snap_date between to_date('20250401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd') then market_stock_txns end) as market_txn_amt_twd_202504
            from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
            where 1=1
            and market_info_code = '001'--台股交易量
            and market_code in ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
            and snap_date between to_date('20240401','yyyymmdd') and to_date('20250430','yyyymmdd')) b
left join acct d on a.party_id = d.party_id and d.rn = 1
)
select
       a.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202404
     , a.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202404
     , a.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202404
     , a.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202404
     , a.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202404
     , a.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202404
     , a.現貨交易量_202404
     , a.市佔BPS_202404
     , a."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202404"
     , a.排名_202404_依營業員 as 排名
     , b.營業員代碼 as 營業員代碼_202504
     , b.營業員員編 as 營業員員編_202504
     , b.營業員姓名 as 營業員姓名_202504
     , b.客戶ID as 客戶ID_202504
     , b.客戶姓名 as 客戶姓名_202504
     , b.客戶台股帳號 as 客戶台股帳號_202504
     , b.現貨交易量_202504
     , b.市佔BPS_202504
     , b."市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404" as "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404_202504"
from
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202404, 排名_202404_依營業員, 市佔BPS_202404, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202404_依營業員 between 1 and 20
) a
inner join
(
select 營業員代碼, 營業員員編, 營業員姓名, 客戶ID, 客戶姓名, 客戶台股帳號, 現貨交易量_202504, 排名_202504_依營業員, 市佔BPS_202504, "市佔增減BPS_202504vs.202404"
from base2
where 1=1
and 排名_202504_依營業員 between 1 and 20
) b
on a.排名_202404_依營業員 = b.排名_202504_依營業員 and a.營業員員編 = b.營業員員編
order by a.營業員代碼, a.排名_202404_依營業員
;
--需求2
with base as (
select a.prod_type_desc as 帳戶別
     , a.acct_nbr as 帳號
     , a.party_id_mask as 客戶ID
     , a.emp_nbr as 交易營業員員編
     , a.sales_nbr as 交易營業員代碼
     , case when a.sales_name = '李?芬' then '李酊' else a.sales_name end as 交易營業員姓名
     , '0'||b.emno as 開戶營業員員編
     , a.open_sales_nbr as 開戶營業員代碼
     , case when b.name = '李?芬' then '李酊' else b.name end as 開戶營業員姓名
     , nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , row_number() over (partition by a.party_id_mask order by a.prod_type_code, a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join dm_s_view.slab_day b
    on a.open_date = b.snap_date and a.branch_code = b.bhno and a.open_sales_nbr = b.sale
inner join dm_s_view.m_pt_sales c on a.emp_nbr = c.emp_nbr and c.emp_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.branch_name = '新營分公司'
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and a.prod_type_code in ('100','200','300','400','500')
and a.emp_nbr is not null
)
, rev as  (
select b.party_id_mask as 客戶ID
     , round(sum(a.rev_amt_twd)) as 財管貢獻
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202405' and '202504'
and a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','210','220','230','240','420','540','6L0')
group by b.party_id_mask
)
, base2 as (
select a.帳戶別
     , a.帳號
     , a.客戶ID
     , c.客戶姓名
     , a.交易營業員員編
     , a.交易營業員代碼
     , a.交易營業員姓名
     , a.開戶營業員員編
     , a.開戶營業員代碼
     , a.開戶營業員姓名
     , a.財管客群
     , nvl(b.財管貢獻,0) as 財管貢獻
from base a
left join rev b on a.客戶ID = b.客戶ID
left join (select distinct b.party_id_mask as 客戶ID, a.party_name as 客戶姓名 from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr) c on a.客戶ID = c.客戶ID
where 1=1
and a.rn = 1
)

--from base2
--;
select 交易營業員員編
     , 交易營業員姓名
     , count(distinct 客戶ID) as 客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 財管客群 in ('富裕一般','富裕PIOSU','價值Plus','價值一般','價值新戶') then 客戶ID end) as 核心客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 交易營業員代碼 = 'A01' then 客戶ID end) as A01客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when substr(交易營業員代碼,1,1) = 'B' then 客戶ID end) as BCODE客戶人數
     , count(distinct case when 財管貢獻 < 1500 then 客戶ID end) as "202405-202504財管貢獻低於1500客戶人數"
from base2
group by 交易營業員員編, 交易營業員姓名
order by 交易營業員員編, 交易營業員姓名
;
--需求3
select emp_nbr
     , sales_name
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
where 1=1
and branch_name = '新營分公司'
and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
and emp_nbr = '006237'
;
with txn as (
select emp_nbr
     , sales_name
     , acct_nbr
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
and prod_type_code = '100'
and prod_mtype_code = '110'
and emp_nbr = '006237'
and substr(transaction_id,-4,4) = 'CMIO'
group by emp_nbr
       , sales_name
       , acct_nbr
)
, market_txn as (
select sum(market_stock_txns) as market_txn_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_rf_market_share
where 1=1
and market_info_code = '001'
and snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
)
, rev as (
select b.emp_nbr
     , b.acct_nbr
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('111R01','111R02') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_st
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('112R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_ml
     , sum(case when rev_code in ('161R01') then rev_amt_twd end) as rev_amt_twd_loan
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.branch_name = '新營分公司' and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y' and b.emp_nbr = '006237'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by b.emp_nbr, b.acct_nbr
)
select a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , d.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , a.txn_amt_twd as 現貨交易量
     , b.market_txn_amt_twd as 現貨市場交易量
     , round(a.txn_amt_twd*10000/b.market_txn_amt_twd,5) as "現貨市佔率(萬分之)"
     , c.rev_amt_twd_st as 現貨貢獻度
     , c.rev_amt_twd_ml as 融資貢獻度
     , c.rev_amt_twd_loan as 不限用途貢獻度
from txn a
cross join market_txn b
left join rev c on a.emp_nbr = c.emp_nbr and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
left join (select a.acct_nbr, a.party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           ) d on a.acct_nbr = d.acct_nbr
order by "現貨市佔率(萬分之)" desc nulls last
;

需求.需求摘要: 南區財管資料報表，用於檢視同仁動能，需包含壽險、基金、結構型、海外債的銷量、收入及實動戶數據，並對基金及結構型數據進行特定修正，且需定期更新並按南區劃分。

SQL.檔名: 每月初定期需求_輔銷南區科_20250506.sql
SQL.內容:
select a.branch_code as 分公司代碼
     , replace(a.branch_name,'分公司')||'分公司' as 分公司名稱
     , a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.emp_name as 營業員姓名
     , a.job_start_date as 到職日
     , nvl(b.txn_amt_twd,0) as 基金交易金額
     , nvl(b.service_fee_amt_twd,0) as 基金貢獻金額
     , nvl(c.txn_amt_twd,0) as 海外債交易金額
     , nvl(c.service_fee_amt_twd,0) as 海外債貢獻金額
     , nvl(c.txn_id_cnt,0) as 海外債實動人數
     , nvl(c.txn_id_cnt_not98,0) as "海外債實動人數(不含98戶)"
     , nvl(d.txn_amt_twd,0) as 結構型交易金額
     , nvl(d.service_fee_amt_twd,0) as 結構型貢獻金額
     , nvl(d.txn_id_cnt,0) as 結構型實動人數
     , nvl(d.txn_id_cnt_not98,0) as "結構型實動人數(不含98戶)"
     , nvl(e.txn_amt_twd,0) as 壽險交易金額
     , nvl(e.service_fee_amt_twd,0) as 壽險貢獻金額
from
(
select a.branch_code
     , a.branch_name
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.emp_name
     , a.job_start_date
from dm_s_view.m_pt_sales a
inner join dm_s_view.m_rf_channel b on a.branch_name = b.branch_name and b.area_name = '南二區部'
where 1=1
and a.emp_flag = 'Y'
) a
left join
(
select emp_nbr
     , sum(txn_amt_twd) as txn_amt_twd
     , sum(service_fee_amt_twd) as service_fee_amt_twd
from
(
select emp_nbr
     , round(sum(txn_amt_twd),0) as txn_amt_twd
     , round(sum(service_fee_amt_twd),0) as service_fee_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_at_fund_txn
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by emp_nbr
union all
select a.wcd1520 as emp_nbr
     , round(sum(case when a.wcd1512 = 'NTD' then a.wcd1513 when a.wcd1512 <> 'NTD' then a.wcd1513 * b.cexrate end),0) as txn_amt_twd
     , round(sum(case when a.wcd1512 = 'NTD' then a.wcd1517 when a.wcd1512 <> 'NTD' then a.wcd1517 * b.cexrate end),0) as service_fee_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.wcd015 a
left join dm_s_view.exrt b on a.wcd1506 = b.tdate and a.wcd1512 = b.sunit and b.dunit = 'TWD'
where 1=1
and to_char(a.wcd1506,'yyyymm') between '202501' and '202504'
group by a.wcd1520
)
group by emp_nbr
) b on a.emp_nbr = b.emp_nbr--基金
left join
(
select emp_nbr
     , round(sum(txn_amt_twd),0) as txn_amt_twd
     , round(sum(service_fee_amt_twd),0) as service_fee_amt_twd
     , count(distinct b.party_id_mask) as txn_id_cnt
     , count(distinct case when substr(acct_nbr,5,2) <> '98' then b.party_id_mask end) as txn_id_cnt_not98
from dm_s_view.m_at_bond_txn a
left join (select distinct party_id, party_id_mask from dm_s_view.m_ac_account) b on a.party_id = b.party_id
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
group by emp_nbr
) c on a.emp_nbr = c.emp_nbr--海外債
left join
(
select emp_nbr
     , round(sum(txn_amt_twd),0) as txn_amt_twd
     , round(sum(service_fee_amt_twd),0) as service_fee_amt_twd
     , count(distinct b.party_id_mask) as txn_id_cnt
     , count(distinct case when substr(acct_nbr,5,2) <> '98' then b.party_id_mask end) as txn_id_cnt_not98
from dm_s_view.m_at_sn_txn a
left join (select distinct party_id, party_id_mask from dm_s_view.m_ac_account) b on a.party_id = b.party_id
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
and termination_type_code = '001'
group by emp_nbr
) d on a.emp_nbr = d.emp_nbr--結構型
left join
(
select emp_nbr
     , round(sum(txn_amt_twd),0) as txn_amt_twd
     , round(sum(service_fee_amt_twd),0) as service_fee_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_at_insurance_txn
where 1=1
and txn_yyyymm between '202501' and '202504'
and policy_status_desc not in ('契撤','逾期')
group by emp_nbr
) e on a.emp_nbr = e.emp_nbr--壽險
order by 1

需求.需求摘要: 獲取證券端客戶於期貨商品交易狀況的月報表及商品滲透率報表，並要求包含所有營業員數據，以供新董事長了解與追蹤滲透率提升狀況，同時作為每月例行性月會資料。
欄位: 證券營業員每月期貨淨頁數據
證券營業員每月活動戶數據
證券營業員每月口數數據
商品滲透率報表 (需包含區部、現貨客群、客群人數、實動戶、今年以來實動戶、滲透率，以及各期貨商品類別的數據：期貨商品(含內外期合計)、內期指數商品、內期股票商品、內期商品合計(不含選擇權)、選擇權商品合計、外期商品合計)
篩選條件: 客群分類: 大戶、中實戶、活躍客群、一般客群 (定義為5億以上、1億-5億、3,000萬-1億、3,000萬以下)
需包含所有營業員，包括新進同仁 (例如: 胡以璇)
需求.其他備註: 此數據用於提供新董事長了解證券端客戶於期貨商品交易狀況。需要分析去年與今年以來商品滲透率是否有提升。相關報表需作為每月例行性月會資料，要求每月月初同步提供。

SQL.內容:
--step1.計算每月貢獻group by到客戶、營業員
def start_date = '20250401' --起始日
def end_date = '20250430' --結束日
def start_month = '202504' --起始月
def end_month = '202504'; --結束月
drop table base_僅202504 purge;
create table base_僅202504 as
with acct_base as (
select a.yyyymm
     , b.acct_nbr_new as acct_nbr
     , b.branch_nbr_new as branch_nbr
     , lpad(c.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
from dm_s_view.f_s_acct_m a
left join dm_s_view.d_s_acct_combine b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
left join dm_s_view.d_s_sales_agent_m c on a.branch_nbr = c.branch_nbr and a.sales_agent_nbr = c.sales_agent_nbr and a.yyyymm = to_char(c.snapshot_date,'yyyymm')
where 1=1
and a.yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
and a.acct_status = 'Y'
and a.branch_nbr not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
group by a.yyyymm, b.acct_nbr_new, b.branch_nbr_new, lpad(c.emp_nbr,6,0)
)

select party_id_mask
     , emp_nbr
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨貢獻','融資貢獻','融券貢獻','期貨貢獻','不限用途貢獻','雙向借券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 經紀貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('海外股貢獻','海外債貢獻','基金貢獻','結構型貢獻','壽險貢獻','銀證海外債貢獻','銀證基金貢獻','銀證結構型貢獻','銀證壽險貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 財管貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨貢獻','融資貢獻','融券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 台股貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 現貨貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨交易金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 現貨交易金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('現貨交易金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 現貨交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融資貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融資貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融資交易金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融資交易金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('融資交易金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 融資交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融券貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融券交易金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融券交易金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('融券交易金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 融券交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('期貨貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 期貨貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('期貨交易口數') then amt_ else 0 end) as 期貨交易口數
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('期貨交易口數') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 期貨交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('不限用途貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 不限用途貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('不限用途借貸金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 不限用途借貸金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('不限用途借貸金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 不限用途借貸人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('雙向借券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 雙向借券貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('雙向借券出借金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 雙向借券出借金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('雙向借券出借金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 雙向借券出借人數
  from (
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '現貨貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.rev_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
 left join acct_base b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.snap_yyyymm = b.yyyymm
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where 1=1
 and a.snap_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.rev_code in ('111R01')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '現貨交易金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 and a.txn_type_detail_code in ('001','002','005','006','007','008')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融資貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.rev_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
 left join acct_base b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.snap_yyyymm = b.yyyymm
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.snap_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.rev_code in ('112R01')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融資交易金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 and a.txn_type_detail_code in ('005','007')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融券貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.rev_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
 left join acct_base b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.snap_yyyymm = b.yyyymm
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.snap_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.rev_code in ('113R01')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融券交易金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 and a.txn_type_detail_code in ('006','008')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '期貨貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.service_fee_amt_twd) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_future_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.future_acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '期貨交易口數' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_unit_qty) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_future_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.future_acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '不限用途貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.service_fee_amt_twd + a.int_amt_twd) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_loan_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '不限用途借貸金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_loan_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
    and a.txn_type_detail_code = '052'
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select e.party_id_mask
      , lpad(c.emno,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '雙向借券貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.fee96) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.d8fe a
 left join dm_s_view.d8mh b on a.sheet = b.psheet and a.pdate = b.pdate
 left join dm_s_view.slab_day c on b.bhno = c.bhno and b.sale = c.sale and b.pdate = c.snap_date
 left join dm_s_view.d8cd d on a.bhno = d.bhno and a.acno = d.acno
 inner join (select distinct party_id, party_id_mask from dm_s_view.m_ac_account) e on d.idno = e.party_id
 where a.tdate between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
   and a.bhno not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 group by e.party_id_mask, lpad(c.emno,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '雙向借券出借金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_bsbl_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
   and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
        )
 group by party_id_mask, emp_nbr
 having party_id_mask not in
       (select distinct party_id_mask
        from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
        where party_id in ('A120634576'--蔡明忠
                          ,'A120634585'--蔡明興
                          ,'A125975830'--蔡承儒
                          ,'A126083608'--蔡承道
                          ,'A202845528'--蔡楊湘薰
                          ,'A220634167'--蔡明玟
                          ,'A220634176'--蔡明純
                          ,'A221863055'--蔡陳藹玲
                          ,'A222891339'--蔡翁美慧
                        ) --排除蔡家
        )
;

def start_date = '20250101' --起始日
def end_date = '20251231' --結束日
def start_month = '202501' --起始月
def end_month = '202512'; --結束月
select a.*
from
(
select a.area_code as 部門代碼
     , a.area_name as 部門名稱
     , a.branch_code as 分公司代碼
     , a.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.emp_name as 營業員姓名
     , sum(nvl(b.經紀貢獻,0)) as 經紀貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.台股貢獻,0)) as 台股貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.現貨貢獻,0)) as 現貨貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.現貨交易金額,0)) as 現貨交易金額
     , sum(nvl(b.現貨交易人數,0)) as 現貨交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.融資貢獻,0)) as 融資貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.融資交易金額,0)) as 融資交易金額
     , sum(nvl(b.融資交易人數,0)) as 融資交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.融券貢獻,0)) as 融券貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.融券交易金額,0)) as 融券交易金額
     , sum(nvl(b.融券交易人數,0)) as 融券交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.期貨貢獻,0)) as 期貨貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.期貨交易口數,0)) as 期貨交易口數
     , sum(nvl(b.期貨交易人數,0)) as 期貨交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.不限用途貢獻,0)) as 不限用途貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.不限用途借貸金額,0)) as 不限用途借貸金額
     , sum(nvl(b.不限用途借貸人數,0)) as 不限用途借貸人數
     , sum(nvl(b.雙向借券貢獻,0)) as 雙向借券貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.雙向借券出借金額,0)) as 雙向借券出借金額
     , sum(nvl(b.雙向借券出借人數,0)) as 雙向借券出借人數
from (
select c.area_code
     , c.area_name
     , c.branch_code
     , replace(c.branch_name,'分公司','')||'分公司' as branch_name
     , a.emp_nbr
     , case when b.emp_name like '%?%' then d.party_name
            when b.emp_name is null then d.party_name
            else b.emp_name end as emp_name
from dm_s_view.m_pt_employee a
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_sales b on a.emp_nbr = b.emp_nbr
left join dm_s_view.m_rf_channel c on a.company_code = c.branch_code
inner join (select distinct party_id, party_id_mask from dm_s_view.m_ac_account) e on a.party_id = e.party_id
left join (select b.party_id_mask
                , a.party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
           group by b.party_id_mask, a.party_name) d on e.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.job_start_date <= to_date('&end_date','yyyymmdd')
and (a.job_end_date is null or a.job_end_date >= to_date('&end_date','yyyymmdd'))
and a.department_name like '%營業組%'
and a.emp_nbr not in (
                      '004561'--蔡有田

                     ,'000511'--朱翊諒
                     ,'003775'--黃孝德
                     ,'009890'--陳慶豪
                     ,'001546'--簡鴻琳
                     ,'010413'--李欣翰
                     ,'010003'--鄧琨霖
                     ,'009828'--何健行
                     ,'010586'--朱志偉
                     ,'002778'--湯瑞林
                     ,'010466'--鄭政旻
                     ,'009162'--柏霞君
                     ,'009016'--林忠信
                     ,'009740'--葉松坡
                     ,'007014'--楊淮茗

and a.emp_nbr not in ('008949'--徐文軒
                     ,'008395'--羅妤婕

                     ,'001394'--李欣曈
                     ,'010537'--王偉哲
                     ,'008567'--楊宛雲
                     ,'008834'--陳胤豪
                     ,'008707'--高豪檉
                     ,'010076'--楊朝宗
                     ,'008611'--王少杉

                     ,'008460'--石婉苓
