需求.需求摘要: 南一區南二區名單需求
欄位: 是否曾經下單過海外股票
是否曾經下單過海外債
是否曾經下單過結構型產品
篩選條件: 區部為南一區或南二區
自2024年12月1號後都沒有下單
需求.其他備註: 靜止戶6個月以上

SQL.內容:
with base as (
select b.branch_code
     , b.party_id_mask
     , sum(a.me_asset_amt_twd) as me_asset_amt_twd
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_asset a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部') and b.close_reason_code <> '011'
inner join dm_s_view.m_pt_customer c on a.party_id = c.party_id and c.age <= 75 and c.cust_type_code = '001'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202505'
group by b.branch_code
       , b.party_id_mask
having sum(a.me_asset_amt_twd) >= 3000000
)
, acct as (
select a.area_code
     , a.area_name
     , a.branch_code
     , a.branch_name
     , a.party_id_mask
     , a.emp_nbr
     , a.sales_nbr
     , a.sales_name
     , b.party_name
     , c.age
     , a.prod_type_code
     , a.prod_type_desc
     , a.acct_nbr
     , a.t_segment_desc
     , a.nw_segment_desc
     , t_daily_limit_amt
     , row_number() over (partition by a.branch_name, a.party_id_mask order by a.prod_type_code, a.last_txn_date desc nulls last, a.open_date desc nulls last) as rn
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a
left join (select distinct party_id_mask, party_name from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name) b on a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_customer c on a.party_id = c.party_id
where 1=1
and a.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部')
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
)
, txn as (
select nvl(b.branch_code,c.branch_code) as branch_code
     , nvl(b.party_id_mask,c.party_id_mask) as party_id_mask
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '110' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 台股交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '110' then a.last_txn_date end) as 台股最後交易日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '150' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 股票出借
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '150' then a.last_txn_date end) as 股票最後出借日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '160' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 不限用途借貸
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '160' then a.last_txn_date end) as 不限用途最後借貸日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('3C0','3F0','3P0','3S0') then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 期權交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('3C0','3F0','3P0','3S0') then a.last_txn_date end) as 期權最後交易日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 海外股交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '210' then a.last_txn_date end) as 海外股最後交易日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 海外債交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '230' then a.last_txn_date end) as 海外債最後交易日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 基金交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('120','220','420') then a.last_txn_date end) as 基金最後交易日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 結構型交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('240','540') then a.last_txn_date end) as 結構型最後交易日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '6L0' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 壽險交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code = '6L0' then a.last_txn_date end) as 壽險最後交易日
     , case when sum(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('110','150','160','3C0','3F0','3P0','3S0','210','230','120','220','420','240','540','6L0') then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 1 else 0 end as 全商品交易
     , max(case when a.prod_mtype_code in ('110','150','160','3C0','3F0','3P0','3S0','210','230','120','220','420','240','540','6L0') then a.last_txn_date end) as 全商品最後交易日
from dm_s_view.m_at_account_txn a
left join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code in ('100','200','400','500','600') and a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and b.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部') and b.close_reason_code <> '011'
left join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on c.prod_type_code in ('300') and a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.sys_new_acct_nbr and c.area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部') and c.close_reason_code <> '011'
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm between '202401' and '202505'
and (b.acct_nbr is not null or c.sys_new_acct_nbr is not null) 
group by nvl(b.branch_code,c.branch_code)
       , nvl(b.party_id_mask,c.party_id_mask)
)
select b.area_name as 區部名稱
     , b.branch_code as 分公司代碼
     , b.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , b.sales_nbr as 營業員代碼
     , case when substr(b.sales_nbr,1,1) = 'B' then 1 else 0 end as 是否為BCODE
     , b.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , b.sales_name as 營業員姓名
     , b.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , b.age as 客戶年齡
     , b.prod_type_desc as 帳戶別
     , b.acct_nbr as 客戶帳號
     , b.t_segment_desc as 經紀客群
     , b.nw_segment_desc as 財管客群
     , nvl(e.f_pi_sign_flag,'N') as 專業投資人註記
     , e.pi_expiry_date as 專業投資人到期日
     , nvl(a.me_asset_amt_twd,0) as 全商品庫存金額
     , nvl(d.台股交易,0) as 台股交易
     , d.台股最後交易日
     , nvl(d.股票出借,0) as 股票出借
     , d.股票最後出借日
     , nvl(d.不限用途借貸,0) as 不限用途借貸
     , d.不限用途最後借貸日
     , nvl(d.期權交易,0) as 期權交易
     , d.期權最後交易日
     , nvl(d.海外股交易,0) as 海外股交易
     , d.海外股最後交易日
     , nvl(d.海外債交易,0) as 海外債交易
     , d.海外債最後交易日
     , nvl(d.基金交易,0) as 基金交易
     , d.基金最後交易日
     , nvl(d.結構型交易,0) as 結構型交易
     , d.結構型最後交易日
     , nvl(d.壽險交易,0) as 壽險交易
     , d.壽險最後交易日
     , nvl(d.全商品交易,0) as 全商品交易
     , d.全商品最後交易日
     , case when d.全商品最後交易日 <= to_date('20241130','yyyymmdd') or d.全商品最後交易日 is null then 1 else 0 end 全商品靜止6月以上
from base a
left join acct b on a.branch_code = b.branch_code and a.party_id_mask = b.party_id_mask and b.rn = 1
left join txn d on a.branch_code = d.branch_code and a.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
left join (select party_id_mask
                , max(f_pi_sign_flag) as f_pi_sign_flag
                , max(pi_expiry_date) as pi_expiry_date
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
           where 1=1
           and area_name in ('南一區部','南二區部')
           and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
           and close_reason_code <> '011'
           and prod_type_code in ('200','500')
           group by party_id_mask) e on b.party_id_mask = e.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and d.全商品最後交易日 <= to_date('20241130','yyyymmdd') or d.全商品最後交易日 is null
order by 專業投資人到期日 desc nulls last
;

業務場景.業務場景: 靜止戶與未實動名單
業務場景.分類理由: 需求以「南一/南二區」客戶名單為主，核心篩選條件為特定日期後皆未下單（長期未交易/靜止），並搭配客戶屬性與往來資產等欄位輸出，符合靜止戶名單產出情境。

需求.需求摘要: 永康分公司信託基金庫存及報酬率更新至2025/06/04的數據

SQL.內容:
select b.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , b.acct_nbr as 客戶財管信託帳號
     , b.sales_name as 客戶財管信託營業員
     , c.party_name as 客戶姓名
     , d.acct_nbr as 客戶台股帳號
     , d.sales_name as 客戶台股營業員
     , a.prod_code as 基金代碼
     , e.prod_full_name as 基金名稱
     , a.net_cost_amt_twd as 投入本金_折台幣
     , a.bal_amt_twd as 現值_折台幣
     , a.benefit_ratio as "未含息未實現報酬率(%)"
     , a.div_benefit_ratio as "含息未實現報酬率(%)"
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_inventory a
inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b
    on a.prod_type_code = b.prod_type_code
   and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
left join (select distinct party_id_mask
                , party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name) c
    on b.party_id_mask = c.party_id_mask
left join (select party_id_mask
                , acct_nbr
                , sales_name
                , row_number() over (partition by party_id_mask order by last_txn_date desc nulls last, open_date desc nulls last) as rn
           from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
           where 1=1
           and branch_name = '永康分公司'
           and prod_type_code = '100'
           and acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
           ) d on d.rn = 1 and b.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
left join dm_s_view.m_rf_fund e on a.inve_prod_id = e.fund_prod_id
where 1=1
and a.snap_yyyymm = '202506'
and a.prod_type_code = '400'
and a.prod_mtype_code = '420'
and b.branch_name = '永康分公司'
and b.prod_type_code = '400'
and b.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'
order by 1, 3

需求.需求摘要: 提供5月份富證分公司期貨資料

SQL.內容:
--step1.計算每月貢獻group by到客戶、營業員
def start_date = '20250501' --起始日
def end_date = '20250531' --結束日
def start_month = '202505' --起始月
def end_month = '202505'; --結束月
drop table base_僅202505 purge;
create table base_僅202505 as
with acct_base as (
select a.yyyymm
     , b.acct_nbr_new as acct_nbr
     , b.branch_nbr_new as branch_nbr
     , lpad(c.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
from dm_s_view.f_s_acct_m a
left join dm_s_view.d_s_acct_combine b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
left join dm_s_view.d_s_sales_agent_m c on a.branch_nbr = c.branch_nbr and a.sales_agent_nbr = c.sales_agent_nbr and a.yyyymm = to_char(c.snapshot_date,'yyyymm')
where 1=1
and a.yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
and a.acct_status = 'Y'
and a.branch_nbr not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
group by a.yyyymm, b.acct_nbr_new, b.branch_nbr_new, lpad(c.emp_nbr,6,0)
)

select party_id_mask
     , emp_nbr
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨貢獻','融資貢獻','融券貢獻','期貨貢獻','不限用途貢獻','雙向借券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 經紀貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('海外股貢獻','海外債貢獻','基金貢獻','結構型貢獻','壽險貢獻','銀證海外債貢獻','銀證基金貢獻','銀證結構型貢獻','銀證壽險貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 財管貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨貢獻','融資貢獻','融券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 台股貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 現貨貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('現貨交易金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 現貨交易金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('現貨交易金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 現貨交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融資貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融資貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融資交易金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融資交易金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('融資交易金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 融資交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融券貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('融券交易金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 融券交易金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('融券交易金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 融券交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('期貨貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 期貨貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('期貨交易口數') then amt_ else 0 end) as 期貨交易口數
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('期貨交易口數') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 期貨交易人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('不限用途貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 不限用途貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('不限用途借貸金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 不限用途借貸金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('不限用途借貸金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 不限用途借貸人數
     , sum(case when type_ in ('雙向借券貢獻') then amt_ else 0 end) as 雙向借券貢獻
     , sum(case when type_ in ('雙向借券出借金額') then amt_ else 0 end) as 雙向借券出借金額
     , count(distinct case when type_ in ('雙向借券出借金額') and amt_ > 0 then party_id_mask else null end) as 雙向借券出借人數
  from (
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '現貨貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.rev_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
 left join acct_base b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.snap_yyyymm = b.yyyymm
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where 1=1
 and a.snap_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.rev_code in ('111R01')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '現貨交易金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 and a.txn_type_detail_code in ('001','002','005','006','007','008')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融資貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.rev_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
 left join acct_base b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.snap_yyyymm = b.yyyymm
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.snap_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.rev_code in ('112R01')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融資交易金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 and a.txn_type_detail_code in ('005','007')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融券貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.rev_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_ac_account_revenue a
 left join acct_base b on a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr and a.snap_yyyymm = b.yyyymm
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.snap_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.rev_code in ('113R01')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(b.emp_nbr,6,0))
 union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '融券交易金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_stock_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_yyyymm between '&start_month' and '&end_month'
 and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 and a.txn_type_detail_code in ('006','008')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '期貨貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.service_fee_amt_twd) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_future_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.future_acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '期貨交易口數' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_unit_qty) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_future_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.future_acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '不限用途貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.service_fee_amt_twd + a.int_amt_twd) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_loan_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '不限用途借貸金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
   from dm_s_view.m_at_loan_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
  where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
    and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
    and a.txn_type_detail_code = '052'
  group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
  union all
(select e.party_id_mask
      , lpad(c.emno,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '雙向借券貢獻' as type_
      , sum(a.fee96) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.d8fe a
 left join dm_s_view.d8mh b on a.sheet = b.psheet and a.pdate = b.pdate
 left join dm_s_view.slab_day c on b.bhno = c.bhno and b.sale = c.sale and b.pdate = c.snap_date
 left join dm_s_view.d8cd d on a.bhno = d.bhno and a.acno = d.acno
 inner join (select distinct party_id, party_id_mask from dm_s_view.m_ac_account) e on d.idno = e.party_id
 where a.tdate between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
   and a.bhno not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 group by e.party_id_mask, lpad(c.emno,6,0))
  union all
(select c.party_id_mask
      , lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0) as emp_nbr
      , '雙向借券出借金額' as type_
      , sum(a.txn_amt_twd) as amt_
 from dm_s_view.m_at_bsbl_txn a
 inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account c on a.prod_type_code = c.prod_type_code and a.acct_nbr = c.acct_nbr
 where a.txn_date between to_date('&start_date', 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date('&end_date', 'YYYYMMDD')
   and a.branch_code not in ('9600','9699','960S','960T')
 group by c.party_id_mask, lpad(a.emp_nbr,6,0))
        )
 group by party_id_mask, emp_nbr
 having party_id_mask not in
       (select distinct party_id_mask
        from dm_s_view.m_ac_account
        where party_id in ('A120634576'--蔡明忠
                          ,'A120634585'--蔡明興
                          ,'A125975830'--蔡承儒
                          ,'A126083608'--蔡承道
                          ,'A202845528'--蔡楊湘薰
                          ,'A220634167'--蔡明玟
                          ,'A220634176'--蔡明純
                          ,'A221863055'--蔡陳藹玲
                          ,'A222891339'--蔡翁美慧
                        ) --排除蔡家
        )
;
--step2.用營業員主體產出宮格(有經驗者)
def start_date = '20250101' --起始日
def end_date = '20251231' --結束日
def start_month = '202501' --起始月
def end_month = '202512'; --結束月
select a.*
from
(
select a.area_code as 部門代碼
     , a.area_name as 部門名稱
     , a.branch_code as 分公司代碼
     , a.branch_name as 分公司名稱
     , a.emp_nbr as 營業員員編
     , a.emp_name as 營業員姓名
     , sum(nvl(b.經紀貢獻,0)) as 經紀貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.台股貢獻,0)) as 台股貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.現貨貢獻,0)) as 現貨貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.現貨交易金額,0)) as 現貨交易金額
     , sum(nvl(b.現貨交易人數,0)) as 現貨交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.融資貢獻,0)) as 融資貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.融資交易金額,0)) as 融資交易金額
     , sum(nvl(b.融資交易人數,0)) as 融資交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.融券貢獻,0)) as 融券貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.融券交易金額,0)) as 融券交易金額
     , sum(nvl(b.融券交易人數,0)) as 融券交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.期貨貢獻,0)) as 期貨貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.期貨交易口數,0)) as 期貨交易口數
     , sum(nvl(b.期貨交易人數,0)) as 期貨交易人數
     , sum(nvl(b.不限用途貢獻,0)) as 不限用途貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.不限用途借貸金額,0)) as 不限用途借貸金額
     , sum(nvl(b.不限用途借貸人數,0)) as 不限用途借貸人數
     , sum(nvl(b.雙向借券貢獻,0)) as 雙向借券貢獻
     , sum(nvl(b.雙向借券出借金額,0)) as 雙向借券出借金額
     , sum(nvl(b.雙向借券出借人數,0)) as 雙向借券出借人數
from (
select c.area_code
     , c.area_name
     , c.branch_code
     , replace(c.branch_name,'分公司','')||'分公司' as branch_name
     , a.emp_nbr
     , case when b.emp_name like '%?%' then d.party_name
            when b.emp_name is null then d.party_name
            else b.emp_name end as emp_name
from dm_s_view.m_pt_employee a
left join dm_s_view.m_pt_sales b on a.emp_nbr = b.emp_nbr
left join dm_s_view.m_rf_channel c on a.company_code = c.branch_code
inner join (select distinct party_id, party_id_mask from dm_s_view.m_ac_account) e on a.party_id = e.party_id
left join (select b.party_id_mask
                , a.party_name
           from s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name a
           inner join dm_s_view.m_ac_account b on b.prod_type_code = '100' and a.acct_nbr = b.acct_nbr
           group by b.party_id_mask, a.party_name) d on e.party_id_mask = d.party_id_mask
where 1=1
and a.job_start_date <= to_date('&end_date','yyyymmdd')
and (a.job_end_date is null or a.job_end_date >= to_date('&end_date','yyyymmdd'))
and a.department_name like '%營業組%'
and a.emp_nbr not in (
                      '004561'--蔡有田
                     ,'006144'--簡嘉慧
                     ,'000380'--楊岳穎
                     ,'009278'--李明芳
                     ,'007560'--沈郁勝
                     ,'009675'--吳珮如
                     ,'008772'--林俐君
                     ,'009872'--何冠瑾                     
                     ,'000511'--朱翊諒
                     ,'003775'--黃孝德
                     ,'009890'--陳慶豪
                     ,'001546'--簡鴻琳
                     ,'010413'--李欣翰
                     ,'007590'--盤嘉訓
                     ,'009828'--何健行
                     ,'010586'--朱志偉
                     ,'002778'--湯瑞林
                     ,'010466'--鄭政旻
                     ,'009162'--柏霞君
                     ,'009016'--林忠信
                     ,'009787'--范凱迪
                     ,'009816'--廖羿鈞
                     ,'009740'--葉松坡
                     ,'007014'--楊淮茗
                     ,'008594'--彭文姿 
                     ,'009630'--董慶輝
                     ,'002567'--黃文英
                     )--排除不揹業績之副負責人與櫃管
and a.emp_nbr not in ('008949'--徐文軒
                     ,'008395'--羅妤婕
                     ,'008576'--黃浩倫
                     ,'010704'--范志誠
                     ,'001394'--李欣曈
                     ,'010537'--王偉哲
                     ,'008567'--楊宛雲
                     ,'008834'--陳胤豪
                     ,'008707'--高豪檉
                     ,'010076'--楊朝宗
                     ,'008611'--王少杉
                     ,'010567'--陳逸仰
                     ,'008460'--石婉苓
                     ,'010808'--盧俊佑
                     )
        ) a
left join base_僅202505 b on a.emp_nbr = b.emp_nbr
group by a.area_code, a.area_name, a.branch_code, a.branch_name, a.emp_nbr, a.emp_name
) a
;

業務場景.業務場景: 財管商品業績與例行月報
業務場景.分類理由: 需求以「5月份分公司期貨」為期間篩選，輸出營業員層級的淨收/貢獻、活動戶/實動戶、口數、滲透率等KPI，屬例行績效彙總型報表而非庫存或名單篩選。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測
靜止戶與未實動名單
精準行銷與專案名單篩選

需求.需求摘要: 產出2025年1-4月新進營業員的業績追蹤資料，並持續追蹤往前推算一個完整年度新進同仁的現貨市佔資料
篩選條件: 針對業績追蹤資料：2025年1-4月新進同仁，具體包含郵件中列出的47名員工
針對現貨市佔資料：往前推算一個完整年度的新進同仁
需求.其他備註: 依先前格式如附檔產出資料

SQL.檔名: 個業營管部數據服務需求_20250208.sql
SQL.內容:
DEF START_DATE = '20240601';
DEF END_DATE = '20250531';
--DEF EMP_NBR_EXCLUDE_lIST = "'008949','010389','010413','010454','010466','010489','010537','010560','010562','010567','010586','010606','010617'";
WITH 營業員 AS (
SELECT A.EMP_NBR AS 營業員員編
     , B.SALES_AGENT_NAME AS 營業員姓名
     , A.JOB_START_DATE AS 到職日
     , A.JOB_END_DATE AS 離職日
     , C.AREA_NAME AS 區部
     , REPLACE(A.DIVISION_NAME,'分公司') AS 分公司
FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_PT_EMPLOYEE A
LEFT JOIN (SELECT EMP_NBR
                , SALES_AGENT_NAME
                , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY EMP_NBR ORDER BY SALES_AGENT_NBR) AS RN
           FROM DM_S_VIEW.D_S_SALES_AGENT_DAILY
           ) B ON SUBSTR(A.EMP_NBR,2,5) = B.EMP_NBR AND B.RN = 1
LEFT JOIN DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_CHANNEL C ON A.COMPANY_CODE = C.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE 1=1
AND A.JOB_START_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
AND ((A.DEPARTMENT_NAME = '營業組' AND SUBSTR(A.SALES_POS_NAME,1,2) = '業務') OR (A.EMP_NBR = '010722'))
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(A.JOB_START_DATE,'YYYYMM'), A.EMP_NBR
)
, 底稿_新戶 AS (
SELECT A.EMP_NBR AS 營業員員編
     , B.JOB_START_DATE AS 到職日
     , B.JOB_END_DATE AS 離職日
     , SUM(ROUND((A.TXN_AMT_TWD/E.CUMUL_MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD)*10000,10)) AS 台股市佔率_調整後
     , SUM(ROUND((A.TXN_AMT_TWD/E.TOTAL_MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD)*10000,10)) AS 台股市佔率_調整前
FROM
(SELECT ACCT_NBR
      , PARTY_ID
      , EMP_NBR
      , TXN_DATE
      , SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
 FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
 WHERE 1=1
 AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE = '110'
 AND TXN_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
 AND TRANSACTION_ID LIKE '%CMIO%'
 GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
        , PARTY_ID
        , EMP_NBR
        , TXN_DATE) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT EMP_NBR
                 , PARTY_ID
                 , JOB_START_DATE
                 , JOB_END_DATE
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_PT_EMPLOYEE
            WHERE 1=1
            AND JOB_START_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            AND DEPARTMENT_NAME = '營業組'
--            AND EMP_NBR NOT IN (&EMP_NBR_EXCLUDE_lIST)
            ) B ON A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
INNER JOIN (SELECT ACCT_NBR
                 , SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
                 , PARTY_ID
                 , EMP_NBR
                 , OPEN_DATE
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
            WHERE 1=1
            AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
            ) D ON B.JOB_START_DATE <= D.OPEN_DATE AND A.ACCT_NBR = D.ACCT_NBR AND A.PARTY_ID = D.PARTY_ID
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SNAP_DATE
                , SUM(MARKET_STOCK_TXNS) AS MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD
                , SUM(SUM(MARKET_STOCK_TXNS)) OVER (ORDER BY SNAP_DATE DESC) AS CUMUL_MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD
                , SUM(SUM(MARKET_STOCK_TXNS)) OVER () AS TOTAL_MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD
           FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_MARKET_SHARE
           WHERE 1=1
           AND MARKET_INFO_CODE = '001'--台股交易量
           AND MARKET_CODE IN ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
           AND ORG_CODE = '0004'--不分類
           AND SNAP_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
           GROUP BY SNAP_DATE) E ON D.OPEN_DATE = E.SNAP_DATE
GROUP BY A.EMP_NBR
       , B.JOB_START_DATE
       , B.JOB_END_DATE
)
SELECT A.區部
     , A.營業員員編
     , A.營業員姓名
     , A.到職日
     , A.離職日
     , A.分公司
     , NVL(B.台股市佔率_調整前,0) AS 台股市佔率_調整前
     , NVL(B.台股市佔率_調整後,0) AS 台股市佔率_調整後
FROM 營業員 A
LEFT JOIN 底稿_新戶 B ON A.營業員員編 = B.營業員員編
ORDER BY A.營業員員編
;
WITH 移轉前 AS (
SELECT A.ACCT_NBR
     , A.PARTY_ID
     , A.EMP_NBR
     , A.最早移轉日
     , NVL(A.TXN_AMT_TWD,0)/NVL(B.MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD,0) AS 台股市佔率
FROM
(
SELECT A.ACCT_NBR
     , A.PARTY_ID
     , A.EMP_NBR
     , C.最早移轉日
     , SUM(D.TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
FROM
(SELECT ACCT_NBR
      , SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
      , PARTY_ID
      , EMP_NBR
      , SALES_NBR
      , OPEN_DATE
FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
WHERE 1=1
AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT EMP_NBR
                 , PARTY_ID
                 , JOB_START_DATE
                 , JOB_END_DATE
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_PT_EMPLOYEE
            WHERE 1=1
            AND JOB_START_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            AND DEPARTMENT_NAME = '營業組'
--            AND EMP_NBR NOT IN (&EMP_NBR_EXCLUDE_lIST)
            ) B ON A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
INNER JOIN (SELECT ACNO AS 客戶帳號
                 , NFIELD AS 新營業員
                 , MIN(TDATE) AS 最早移轉日
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.CUCG
            WHERE 1=1
            AND FLNO = '0018'
            AND TDATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            GROUP BY ACNO, NFIELD) C ON SUBSTR(A.ACCT_NBR,1,10) = C.客戶帳號 AND A.SALES_NBR = C.新營業員
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ACCT_NBR
                , PARTY_ID
                , EMP_NBR
                , TXN_DATE
                , SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
           FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
           WHERE 1=1
           AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE = '110'
           AND TXN_DATE BETWEEN ADD_MONTHS('&START_DATE',-3) AND '&END_DATE'
           AND TRANSACTION_ID LIKE '%CMIO%'
           GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
                  , PARTY_ID
                  , EMP_NBR
                  , TXN_DATE) D ON A.ACCT_NBR = D.ACCT_NBR AND A.PARTY_ID = D.PARTY_ID AND MONTHS_BETWEEN(C.最早移轉日, D.TXN_DATE) BETWEEN 0 AND 3
GROUP BY A.ACCT_NBR
       , A.PARTY_ID
       , A.EMP_NBR
       , C.最早移轉日
) A
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT A.ACCT_NBR
     , A.PARTY_ID
     , A.EMP_NBR
     , C.最早移轉日
     , SUM(MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD) AS MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD
FROM
(SELECT ACCT_NBR
      , SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
      , PARTY_ID
      , EMP_NBR
      , SALES_NBR
      , OPEN_DATE
FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
WHERE 1=1
AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT EMP_NBR
                 , PARTY_ID
                 , JOB_START_DATE
                 , JOB_END_DATE
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_PT_EMPLOYEE
            WHERE 1=1
            AND JOB_START_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            AND DEPARTMENT_NAME = '營業組'
--            AND EMP_NBR NOT IN (&EMP_NBR_EXCLUDE_lIST)
            ) B ON A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
INNER JOIN (SELECT ACNO AS 客戶帳號
                 , NFIELD AS 新營業員
                 , MIN(TDATE) AS 最早移轉日
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.CUCG
            WHERE 1=1
            AND FLNO = '0018'
            AND TDATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            GROUP BY ACNO, NFIELD) C ON SUBSTR(A.ACCT_NBR,1,10) = C.客戶帳號 AND A.SALES_NBR = C.新營業員
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SNAP_DATE
                , SUM(MARKET_STOCK_TXNS) AS MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD
           FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_MARKET_SHARE
           WHERE 1=1
           AND MARKET_INFO_CODE = '001'--台股交易量
           AND MARKET_CODE IN ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
           AND ORG_CODE = '0004'--不分類
           AND SNAP_DATE BETWEEN ADD_MONTHS('&START_DATE',-3) AND '&END_DATE'
           GROUP BY SNAP_DATE) E ON MONTHS_BETWEEN(C.最早移轉日, E.SNAP_DATE) BETWEEN 0 AND 3 
GROUP BY A.ACCT_NBR
       , A.PARTY_ID
       , A.EMP_NBR
       , C.最早移轉日
) B ON A.ACCT_NBR = B.ACCT_NBR
   AND A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID
   AND A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
   AND A.最早移轉日 = B.最早移轉日
)
, 移轉後 AS (
SELECT A.ACCT_NBR
     , A.PARTY_ID
     , A.EMP_NBR
     , A.最早移轉日
     , NVL(A.TXN_AMT_TWD,0)/NULLIF(NVL(B.MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD,0),0) AS 台股市佔率
FROM
(
SELECT A.ACCT_NBR
     , A.PARTY_ID
     , A.EMP_NBR
     , C.最早移轉日
     , SUM(D.TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
FROM
(SELECT ACCT_NBR
      , SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
      , PARTY_ID
      , EMP_NBR
      , SALES_NBR
      , OPEN_DATE
FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
WHERE 1=1
AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT EMP_NBR
                 , PARTY_ID
                 , JOB_START_DATE
                 , JOB_END_DATE
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_PT_EMPLOYEE
            WHERE 1=1
            AND JOB_START_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            AND DEPARTMENT_NAME = '營業組'
--            AND EMP_NBR NOT IN (&EMP_NBR_EXCLUDE_lIST)
            ) B ON A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
INNER JOIN (SELECT ACNO AS 客戶帳號
                 , NFIELD AS 新營業員
                 , MIN(TDATE) AS 最早移轉日
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.CUCG
            WHERE 1=1
            AND FLNO = '0018'
            AND TDATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            GROUP BY ACNO, NFIELD) C ON SUBSTR(A.ACCT_NBR,1,10) = C.客戶帳號 AND A.SALES_NBR = C.新營業員
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ACCT_NBR
                , PARTY_ID
                , EMP_NBR
                , TXN_DATE
                , SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
           FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
           WHERE 1=1
           AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE = '110'
           AND TXN_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
           AND TRANSACTION_ID LIKE '%CMIO%'
           GROUP BY ACCT_NBR
                  , PARTY_ID
                  , EMP_NBR
                  , TXN_DATE) D ON A.ACCT_NBR = D.ACCT_NBR AND A.PARTY_ID = D.PARTY_ID AND D.TXN_DATE >= C.最早移轉日
GROUP BY A.ACCT_NBR
       , A.PARTY_ID
       , A.EMP_NBR
       , C.最早移轉日
) A
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT A.ACCT_NBR
     , A.PARTY_ID
     , A.EMP_NBR
     , C.最早移轉日
     , SUM(E.MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD) AS MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD
FROM
(SELECT ACCT_NBR
      , SYS_NEW_ACCT_NBR
      , PARTY_ID
      , EMP_NBR
      , SALES_NBR
      , OPEN_DATE
FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
WHERE 1=1
AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
) A
INNER JOIN (SELECT EMP_NBR
                 , PARTY_ID
                 , JOB_START_DATE
                 , JOB_END_DATE
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_PT_EMPLOYEE
            WHERE 1=1
            AND JOB_START_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            AND DEPARTMENT_NAME = '營業組'
--            AND EMP_NBR NOT IN (&EMP_NBR_EXCLUDE_lIST)
            ) B ON A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
INNER JOIN (SELECT ACNO AS 客戶帳號
                 , NFIELD AS 新營業員
                 , MIN(TDATE) AS 最早移轉日
            FROM DM_S_VIEW.CUCG
            WHERE 1=1
            AND FLNO = '0018'
            AND TDATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
            GROUP BY ACNO, NFIELD) C ON SUBSTR(A.ACCT_NBR,1,10) = C.客戶帳號 AND A.SALES_NBR = C.新營業員
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SNAP_DATE
                , SUM(MARKET_STOCK_TXNS) AS MARKET_TXN_AMT_TWD
           FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_MARKET_SHARE
           WHERE 1=1
           AND MARKET_INFO_CODE = '001'--台股交易量
           AND MARKET_CODE IN ('001','002')--001上市, 002上櫃
           AND ORG_CODE = '0004'--不分類
           AND SNAP_DATE BETWEEN '&START_DATE' AND '&END_DATE'
           GROUP BY SNAP_DATE) E ON E.SNAP_DATE >= C.最早移轉日
GROUP BY A.ACCT_NBR
       , A.PARTY_ID
       , A.EMP_NBR
       , C.最早移轉日
) B ON A.ACCT_NBR = B.ACCT_NBR
   AND A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID
   AND A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
   AND A.最早移轉日 = B.最早移轉日
)
SELECT A.EMP_NBR
     , ROUND(SUM(B.台股市佔率)*10000,10) AS 台股市佔率_移轉後
     , ROUND(SUM(A.台股市佔率)*10000,10) AS 台股市佔率_移轉前
FROM 移轉前 A
LEFT JOIN 移轉後 B ON A.ACCT_NBR = B.ACCT_NBR
                 AND A.PARTY_ID = B.PARTY_ID
                 AND A.EMP_NBR = B.EMP_NBR
                 AND A.最早移轉日 = B.最早移轉日
GROUP BY A.EMP_NBR
;

業務場景.業務場景: 財管商品業績與例行月報
業務場景.分類理由: 此需求核心在於追蹤「新進營業員」的到職業績表現，並透過 CUCG 資料表計算客戶移轉至新進人員前後的市佔率變化。SQL 邏輯中顯著包含移轉前（移轉前）與移轉後（移轉後）的數據對比，完全符合該標籤針對營業員職務調整後的業績銜接與客戶流向追蹤之定義。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測

業務場景.gemini審查意見: 原標籤「市佔率與交易排名分析」雖涵蓋了 SQL 中的計算指標，但未能精確反映「以人員異動為前提」的業務情境。此報表的目的並非全體客戶或分公司的市佔競爭力排名，而是針對特定新進人員群組及其承接客戶的動態管理，故建議修正為「人員異動與客戶移轉管理」。
業務場景.原始標籤: 市佔率與交易排名分析
業務場景.openai複審理由: 此需求的核心是「新進營業員名單（到職/離職）＋其業績追蹤與現貨市佔指標」的期間性追蹤，屬於管理/人力名單驅動的KPI追蹤報表。雖然包含『現貨市佔』字眼，但目標並非產出分公司/全體客戶的TopN交易排名或競爭態勢排行，與「市佔率與交易排名分析」的典型輸出（Top客戶、排名、全體比較）不符。另一方面，案例也未呈現『離職/優退造成客戶歸屬移轉、原/新營業員、移轉日期、移轉後交易表現』等移轉管理必備元素，因此直接歸為「人員異動與客戶移轉管理」也偏離情境。就既有固定標籤中，最貼近的是以固定期間（2025/1-4新進、往前推一年）定期輸出員工/區部分拆的業績KPI追蹤之「財管商品業績與例行月報」（雖然此標籤描述偏財管五項商品，但在現有選項內仍最符合『例行KPI追蹤』本質）。

需求.需求摘要: 南屯分公司借券專案目標名單提供

SQL.檔名: 未簽署台股借券客戶名單_南屯_20250611.sql
SQL.內容:
select a.acct_nbr, a.party_id, c.party_name, b.age, a.open_date, a.sales_name, a.sales_nbr,
case when COALESCE(SUM(d.BAL_AMT_TWD), 0)>0  then 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS 有無庫存
from dm_s_view.m_ac_account a 
left join dm_s_view.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INFO b on a.acct_nbr= b.acct_nbr and a.prod_type_code= b.prod_type_code
left join s_chiahsuanhsu.party_name c on a.acct_nbr= c.acct_nbr and a.party_id_mask=c.party_id_mask
left join dm_s_view.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY d on a.acct_nbr= d.acct_nbr and a.prod_type_code= d.prod_type_code
where 1=1
and a.prod_type_code = '100'--台股
and a.acct_valid_flag = 'Y'--有效戶
and a.branch_name = '南屯分公司'
and a.T_BSBL_SIGN_FLAG = 'N'--台股股票出借資格無效
and TO_CHAR(a.open_date, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3), 'YYYYMMDD')
and b.age >= '18'
GROUP BY a.acct_nbr, a.party_id, c.party_name, b.age, a.open_date, a.sales_name, a.sales_nbr

需求.需求摘要: 臺北分公司總覽清單
欄位: 台北分公司有效戶資料

SQL.內容:
/* 例行性報表 - 台北分公司客戶總覽 */

/* 台北分公司有效戶母體 */
WITH 台北有效戶 AS (
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 資料日期,
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司名稱,
    ACC.EMP_NBR 營業員員編,
    ACC.SALES_NBR AS 營業員代碼,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名,
    ACC.PROD_TYPE_DESC AS 帳戶類別,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    ACC.F_PI_SIGN_FLAG AS PI簽署註記,
    TO_CHAR(ACC.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 開戶日期,
    ACC_INFO.KYC_RISK_DESC AS KYC, 
    ACC_INFO.OCCU_DESC AS 職業,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') AS 經紀客群,
    財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW AS 財管客群
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INFO ACC_INFO ON ACC_INFO.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR AND ACC_INFO.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID_MASK AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
),

/* 台股庫存 */
台股庫存 AS (
SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS BAL_AMT_TWD
FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
WHERE
    PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM = (SELECT MAX(YEARMONTH) FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_DATE WHERE S_WORKDAY = 'Y' AND DATE_DID < SYSDATE - 1)
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
),

/* 現貨交易量 */
現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202507'
        AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    GROUP BY
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR TXN_YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "202501_現貨交易量",
                                         '202502' AS "202502_現貨交易量",
                                         '202503' AS "202503_現貨交易量",
                                         '202504' AS "202504_現貨交易量",
                                         '202505' AS "202505_現貨交易量",
                                         '202506' AS "202506_現貨交易量",
                                         '202507' AS "202507_現貨交易量"))
),

/* 非現貨交易量 */
非現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_UNIT_QTY AS TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '期選' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUTURE_TXN -- 期選
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '不限用途' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_LOAN_TXN -- 不限用途
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
            AND TXN_TYPE_DETAIL_CODE = '052' -- 新增
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '借券' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BSBL_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外股' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
            AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' -- 複委託
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外債' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BOND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
        UNION ALL 
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '基金' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '結構型' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_SN_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '保險' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
            AND POLICY_STATUS_CODE = '1' -- 已核保
    )
    GROUP BY
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR PROD IN ('期選' AS "2025_期選交易口數",
                                   '不限用途' AS "2025_不限用途交易量",
                                   '借券' AS "2025_借券交易量",
                                   '海外股' AS "2025_海外股交易量",
                                   '海外債' AS "2025_海外債交易量",
                                   '基金' AS "2025_基金交易量",
                                   '結構型' AS "2025_結構型交易量",
                                   '保險' AS "2025_保險交易量"))
)

/* 最終表格整併 */
SELECT
    台北有效戶.資料日期,
    台北有效戶.分公司名稱,
    台北有效戶.營業員員編,
    台北有效戶.營業員代碼,
    台北有效戶.營業員姓名,
    台北有效戶.帳戶類別,
    台北有效戶.客戶帳號,
    台北有效戶.客戶證號,
    台北有效戶.客戶姓名,
    台北有效戶.PI簽署註記,
    台北有效戶.開戶日期,
    台北有效戶.KYC,
    台北有效戶.職業,
    台北有效戶.經紀客群,
    台北有效戶.財管客群,
    NVL(台股庫存.BAL_AMT_TWD, 0) AS 最新台股庫存,
    NVL(現貨交易量."202501_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202501_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202502_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202502_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202503_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202503_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202504_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202504_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202505_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202505_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202506_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202506_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202507_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202507_現貨交易量",
    NVL("202501_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202502_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202503_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202504_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202505_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202506_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202507_現貨交易量", 0) AS "2025YTD_現貨交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_期選交易口數", 0) AS "2025_期選交易口數",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_不限用途交易量", 0) AS "2025_不限用途交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_借券交易量", 0) AS "2025_借券交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_海外股交易量", 0) AS "2025_海外股交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_海外債交易量", 0) AS "2025_海外債交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_基金交易量", 0) AS "2025_基金交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_結構型交易量", 0) AS "2025_結構型交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_保險交易量", 0) AS "2025_保險交易量"
FROM
    台北有效戶
LEFT JOIN
    台股庫存 ON 台股庫存.ACCT_NBR = 台北有效戶.客戶帳號
LEFT JOIN
    現貨交易量 ON 現貨交易量.ACCT_NBR = 台北有效戶.客戶帳號
LEFT JOIN
    非現貨交易量 ON 非現貨交易量.PARTY_ID = 台北有效戶.客戶證號
ORDER BY
    台北有效戶.營業員員編,
    台北有效戶.客戶證號,
    台北有效戶.客戶帳號
;

業務場景.業務場景: 財管商品業績與例行月報
業務場景.分類理由: 此報表提供台北分公司之有效戶總覽，內容包含客戶之基本屬性標籤（PI資格、KYC風險等級、經紀與財管客群分類）以及跨產品線（現貨、期權、不限用途借貸、基金、保險等）的交易量與庫存數據。這類包含多維度屬性與產品往來細節的名單，主要用於分公司進行客戶經營、活動對象圈選與精準行銷推廣，符合該標籤之定義。

各標籤置信度.標籤: 庫存與損益明細報表
財管商品業績與例行月報
市佔率與交易排名分析
交易動能趨勢與異動偵測

業務場景.gemini審查意見: 原標籤「市佔率與交易排名分析」不正確。該 SQL 腳本的核心為單一分公司的客戶明細彙總，雖包含交易量數據，但並未涉及市佔率（bps）的計算、全市場競爭態勢比較，亦非以交易量排名為主要產出目的。其呈現的 PI 註記與客群貼標欄位，更偏向於行銷名單篩選與客戶管理用途。
業務場景.原始標籤: 市佔率與交易排名分析
業務場景.openai複審理由: 就提供的需求摘要與 SQL 片段來看，主體是「例行性報表 - 台北分公司客戶總覽 / 台北分公司有效戶母體」，以單一分公司為範圍，拉出有效戶名單與基本屬性（營業員、帳戶類別、客戶資料、PI 簽署、開戶日、KYC/職業、客群貼標等），並要求帶出「現貨交易量」。這類輸出更像分公司每日/例行的經營管理用總覽清單，而非(1)市佔率或排名（未見 bps、市佔率計算、TopN/排行或跨分公司/全市場比較），因此不適合維持原「市佔率與交易排名分析」；也非(2)以專案規則做多條件 AND 圈選活動目標名單（目前僅看到分公司條件與一般屬性欄位，沒有明確專案門檻、活動期間、特定商品/股票清單等行銷圈選邏輯），因此不完全符合「精準行銷與專案名單篩選」。在既有固定標籤中，最貼近的是「財管商品業績與例行月報」的『例行』管理報表性質（雖未完整呈現五項商品KPI，但定位更接近例行分公司經營總覽），故建議第三標籤選此。
業務場景.審查狀態: 建議第三標籤🔍需人工確認

需求.需求摘要: 協助提供台北分公司現貨AUM及客戶數

SQL.內容:
/* Ver.1 北四區部有效戶&最新AUM */
SELECT
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME,
    ACC.EMP_NBR,
    ACC.SALES_NAME,
    COUNT(ACC.ACCT_NBR) AS 名下有效戶數,
    SUM(INV.BAL_AMT_TWD) AS 最新AUM
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    (SELECT
        ACCT_NBR,
        SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS BAL_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
    WHERE
        SNAP_YYYYMM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMM')
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
        AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE = '110' -- 一般台股
    GROUP BY
        ACCT_NBR
    ) INV ON INV.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL -- 有效戶
    AND ACC.AREA_CODE = '44' -- 北四區部
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND (ACC.EMP_NBR IS NOT NULL OR ACC.SALES_NAME IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME,
    ACC.EMP_NBR,
    ACC.SALES_NAME
ORDER BY
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME,
    ACC.SALES_NAME
;

/* Ver.2 台北分公司核心客戶數&最新AUM */
SELECT
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    ACC.EMP_NBR AS 員編,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員,
    COUNT(ACC.ACCT_NBR) AS 名下有效核心客戶戶數,
    NVL(SUM(INV.BAL_AMT_TWD), 0) AS 最新AUM加總
FROM
    (SELECT
        BRANCH_NAME,
        EMP_NBR,
        SALES_NAME,
        ACCT_NBR
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT
    WHERE
        ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND CLOSE_DATE IS NULL -- 有效戶
        AND T_SEGMENT_CODE IN ('001', '002') -- 核心客戶(A大戶, B中實戶)
        AND BRANCH_CODE = '9623' -- 台北分公司
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
        AND (EMP_NBR IS NOT NULL OR SALES_NAME IS NOT NULL)
    ) ACC
LEFT JOIN
    (SELECT
        ACCT_NBR,
        SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS BAL_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
    WHERE
        SNAP_YYYYMM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMM')
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
        AND PROD_MTYPE_CODE = '110' -- 一般台股
        AND ACCT_NBR LIKE '9623%' -- 台北分公司
    GROUP BY
        ACCT_NBR
    ) INV ON INV.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
GROUP BY
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME,
    ACC.EMP_NBR,
    ACC.SALES_NAME
;

業務場景.業務場景: 庫存與損益明細報表
業務場景.分類理由: 需求以「現貨AUM（庫存市值/餘額彙總）」與「客戶數」為核心，並依分公司（台北分公司）進行彙總，屬於資產/庫存現況的統計輸出而非交易量、動能或行銷名單。

需求.需求摘要: 提供北四區部轄下所有分公司的數據資料
篩選條件: 分公司為北四區部轄下
分公司名稱為台北、花蓮、羅東、宜蘭、三重
需求.其他備註: 以利憶華彙整後提供部長所需資料統計。目前僅收到三重分公司的文件，請協助提供其他分公司的資料。

SQL.內容:
/* 例行性報表 - 北四區客戶總覽 */

/* 北四區有效戶母體 */
WITH 北四區有效戶 AS (
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 資料日期,
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司名稱,
    ACC.EMP_NBR 營業員員編,
    ACC.SALES_NBR AS 營業員代碼,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名,
    ACC.PROD_TYPE_DESC AS 帳戶類別,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    ACC.F_PI_SIGN_FLAG AS PI簽署註記,
    TO_CHAR(ACC.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 開戶日期,
    ACC_INFO.KYC_RISK_DESC AS KYC, 
    ACC_INFO.OCCU_DESC AS 職業,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') AS 經紀客群,
    財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW AS 財管客群
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INFO ACC_INFO ON ACC_INFO.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR AND ACC_INFO.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID_MASK AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634') -- 台北分公司, 三重分公司, 宜蘭分公司, 花蓮分公司, 羅東分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
),

/* 台股庫存 */
台股庫存 AS (
SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS BAL_AMT_TWD
FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
WHERE
    PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM = (SELECT MAX(YEARMONTH) FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_DATE WHERE S_WORKDAY = 'Y' AND DATE_DID < SYSDATE - 1)
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
),

/* 現貨交易量 */
現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202507'
        AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    GROUP BY
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR TXN_YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "202501_現貨交易量",
                                         '202502' AS "202502_現貨交易量",
                                         '202503' AS "202503_現貨交易量",
                                         '202504' AS "202504_現貨交易量",
                                         '202505' AS "202505_現貨交易量",
                                         '202506' AS "202506_現貨交易量",
                                         '202507' AS "202507_現貨交易量"))
),

/* 非現貨交易量 */
非現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_UNIT_QTY AS TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '期選' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUTURE_TXN -- 期選
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '不限用途' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_LOAN_TXN -- 不限用途
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
            AND TXN_TYPE_DETAIL_CODE = '052' -- 新增
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '借券' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BSBL_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外股' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
            AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' -- 複委託
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外債' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BOND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
        UNION ALL 
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '基金' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '結構型' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_SN_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '保險' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9623', '9677', '9686', '9621', '9634')
            AND POLICY_STATUS_CODE = '1' -- 已核保
    )
    GROUP BY
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR PROD IN ('期選' AS "2025_期選交易口數",
                                   '不限用途' AS "2025_不限用途交易量",
                                   '借券' AS "2025_借券交易量",
                                   '海外股' AS "2025_海外股交易量",
                                   '海外債' AS "2025_海外債交易量",
                                   '基金' AS "2025_基金交易量",
                                   '結構型' AS "2025_結構型交易量",
                                   '保險' AS "2025_保險交易量"))
)

/* 最終表格整併 */
SELECT
    北四區有效戶.資料日期,
    北四區有效戶.分公司名稱,
    北四區有效戶.營業員員編,
    北四區有效戶.營業員代碼,
    北四區有效戶.營業員姓名,
    北四區有效戶.帳戶類別,
    北四區有效戶.客戶帳號,
    北四區有效戶.客戶姓名,
    北四區有效戶.PI簽署註記,
    北四區有效戶.開戶日期,
    北四區有效戶.KYC,
    北四區有效戶.職業,
    北四區有效戶.經紀客群,
    北四區有效戶.財管客群,
    NVL(台股庫存.BAL_AMT_TWD, 0) AS 最新台股庫存,
    NVL(現貨交易量."202501_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202501_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202502_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202502_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202503_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202503_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202504_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202504_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202505_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202505_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202506_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202506_現貨交易量",
    NVL(現貨交易量."202507_現貨交易量", 0) AS "202507_現貨交易量",
    NVL("202501_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202502_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202503_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202504_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202505_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202506_現貨交易量", 0)+NVL("202507_現貨交易量", 0) AS "2025YTD_現貨交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_期選交易口數", 0) AS "2025_期選交易口數",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_不限用途交易量", 0) AS "2025_不限用途交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_借券交易量", 0) AS "2025_借券交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_海外股交易量", 0) AS "2025_海外股交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_海外債交易量", 0) AS "2025_海外債交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_基金交易量", 0) AS "2025_基金交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_結構型交易量", 0) AS "2025_結構型交易量",
    NVL(非現貨交易量."2025_保險交易量", 0) AS "2025_保險交易量"
FROM
    北四區有效戶
LEFT JOIN
    台股庫存 ON 台股庫存.ACCT_NBR = 北四區有效戶.客戶帳號
LEFT JOIN
    現貨交易量 ON 現貨交易量.ACCT_NBR = 北四區有效戶.客戶帳號
LEFT JOIN
    非現貨交易量 ON 非現貨交易量.PARTY_ID = 北四區有效戶.客戶證號
ORDER BY
    北四區有效戶.分公司名稱,
    北四區有效戶.營業員員編,
    北四區有效戶.客戶證號,
    北四區有效戶.客戶帳號
;

需求.需求摘要: 查詢市占率資料

SQL.內容:
WITH TXN AS (
SELECT
    SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) AS TXN_YYYY,
    NVL(TXN_YYYYMM, '年彙整') AS TXN_YYYYMM,
    SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202101' AND '202508'
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    AND BRANCH_NAME = '青埔分公司'
    AND AND SUBSTR(TRANSACTION_ID, 24, 4) IN ('CMIO') -- 排除興櫃
GROUP BY
    SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4),
    CUBE(TXN_YYYYMM)
ORDER BY
    TXN_YYYYMM
),

MARKET AS (
SELECT
    SUBSTR(SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) AS SNAP_YYYY,
    NVL(SNAP_YYYYMM, '年彙整') AS SNAP_YYYYMM,
    SUM(MARKET_STOCK_TXNS) AS 市場交易量
FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_MARKET_SHARE 
WHERE 
    SNAP_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('20210101', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20250831','YYYYMMDD')
    AND MARKET_INFO_CODE = '001'
GROUP BY
    SUBSTR(SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4),
    CUBE(SNAP_YYYYMM)
)

SELECT
    TXN.TXN_YYYY AS 年,
    CASE WHEN TXN.TXN_YYYYMM = '年彙整' THEN TXN.TXN_YYYY || '(年彙整)' ELSE TXN.TXN_YYYYMM END AS 月,
    TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD AS 現貨交易量,
    ROUND(TXN.TXN_AMT_TWD/MARKET.市場交易量, 8) AS 市占率
FROM
    TXN
LEFT JOIN
    MARKET ON MARKET.SNAP_YYYYMM = TXN.TXN_YYYYMM AND MARKET.SNAP_YYYY = TXN.TXN_YYYY
ORDER BY
    TXN.TXN_YYYY,
    TXN.TXN_YYYYMM
;

需求.需求摘要: 統計各分公司五項財管商品例年月的業績

SQL.內容:
SELECT
    BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) AS 交易年,
    CASE WHEN TXN_YYYYMM IS NULL THEN SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4) || 'FY' ELSE TXN_YYYYMM END AS 交易年月,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD = '海外股' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外股,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD = '基金' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 基金,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD = '海外債' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 海外債,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD = '結構型' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 結構型,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD = '壽險' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 壽險
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        BRANCH_NAME,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        TXN_AMT_TWD,
        '海外股' AS PROD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202101' AND '202508'
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' -- 複委託
        AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    UNION
    SELECT
        BRANCH_NAME,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        TXN_AMT_TWD,
        '基金' AS PROD 
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUND_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202101' AND '202508'
        AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    UNION        
    SELECT
        BRANCH_NAME,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        TXN_AMT_TWD,
        '海外債' AS PROD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BOND_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202101' AND '202508'
        AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    UNION
    SELECT
        BRANCH_NAME,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        TXN_AMT_TWD,
        '結構型' AS PROD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_SN_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202101' AND '202508'
        AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    UNION
    SELECT
        BRANCH_NAME,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        TXN_AMT_TWD,
        '壽險' AS PROD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202101' AND '202508'
        AND POLICY_STATUS_CODE IN ('0', '1') -- 進件, 已核保
        AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    ) 
GROUP BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4),
    CUBE(TXN_YYYYMM)
ORDER BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    SUBSTR(TXN_YYYYMM, 1, 4),
    TXN_YYYYMM
;

需求.需求摘要: 查詢北五區部各分公司經紀客群(A, B, C)人數變化及新開戶明細
欄位: 北五區部各分公司經紀客群(A, B, C)人數的變化
需求.其他備註: 希望保留歷月完整的開戶明細

SQL.內容:
/* 財管客群戶數變動 */
WITH 財管_2025 AS (
SELECT
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    CASE WHEN NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW, '潛力') IS NULL THEN '加總' ELSE NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW, '潛力') END AS 財管客群,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ACC.ACCT_NBR) AS "2025戶數"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID_MASK AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL
    AND SUBSTR(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 1, 1) NOT IN ('E', 'F')
GROUP BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    CUBE(NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW, '潛力'))
ORDER BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    DECODE(
    NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW, '潛力'),
    '富裕一般', 0,
    '富裕PIOSU', 1,
    '價值新戶', 2,
    '價值Plus', 3,
    '價值一般', 4,
    '價值新戶', 5,
    '潛力', 6
    )
),

財管_2024 AS ( 
SELECT
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    CASE WHEN NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_年初, '潛力') IS NULL THEN '加總' ELSE NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_年初, '潛力') END AS 財管客群,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ACC.ACCT_NBR) AS "2024戶數"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID_MASK AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND OPEN_DATE < TO_DATE('2025-01-01')
    AND (CLOSE_DATE IS NULL OR CLOSE_DATE >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01'))
    AND SUBSTR(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 1, 1) NOT IN ('E', 'F')
GROUP BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    CUBE(NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_年初, '潛力'))
ORDER BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    DECODE(
    NVL(財管客群貼標.客群整合_年初, '潛力'),
    '富裕一般', 0,
    '富裕PIOSU', 1,
    '價值新戶', 2,
    '價值Plus', 3,
    '價值一般', 4,
    '價值新戶', 5,
    '潛力', 6
    )
)

SELECT
    財管_2024.分公司,
    財管_2024.財管客群,
    財管_2024."2024戶數",
    財管_2025."2025戶數",
    ROUND((財管_2025."2025戶數" - 財管_2024."2024戶數")/財管_2024."2024戶數", 4) AS 增減比例
FROM
    財管_2024
INNER JOIN
    財管_2025 ON 財管_2024.分公司 = 財管_2025.分公司 AND 財管_2024.財管客群 = 財管_2025.財管客群
;


/* 經紀客群戶數變動 */
WITH ABC_2025 AS ( 
SELECT
    BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    CASE WHEN NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') IS NULL THEN '加總' ELSE NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') END AS 經紀客群,
    COUNT(ACC.ACCT_NBR) AS "2025年戶數"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND CLOSE_DATE IS NULL
    AND SUBSTR(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 1, 1) NOT IN ('E', 'F')
GROUP BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    CUBE(NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他'))
ORDER BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他')
),

ABC_2024 AS ( 
SELECT
    BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    CASE WHEN NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') IS NULL THEN '加總' ELSE NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') END AS 經紀客群,
    COUNT(ACC.ACCT_NBR) AS "2024年戶數"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股
    AND OPEN_DATE < TO_DATE('2025-01-01')
    AND (CLOSE_DATE IS NULL OR CLOSE_DATE >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01'))
    AND SUBSTR(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 1, 1) NOT IN ('E', 'F')
GROUP BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    CUBE(NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他'))
ORDER BY
    BRANCH_NAME,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他')
)

SELECT
    ABC_2024.分公司,
    ABC_2024.經紀客群,
    ABC_2024."2024年戶數",
    ABC_2025."2025年戶數",
    ROUND((ABC_2025."2025年戶數" - ABC_2024."2024年戶數")/ABC_2024."2024年戶數", 4) AS 增減比例
FROM
    ABC_2024
INNER JOIN
    ABC_2025 ON ABC_2024.分公司 = ABC_2025.分公司 AND ABC_2024.經紀客群 = ABC_2025.經紀客群
;

/* 2025 新開戶且年交易量累計至 500萬 */
WITH NEW_OPEN_ACC AS (
SELECT
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR,
    ACC.OPEN_DATE,
    ACC.SALES_NAME,
    PARTY_NAME.PARTY_NAME
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME ON PARTY_NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
WHERE
    ACC.OPEN_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('2025-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2025-12-31')
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股帳戶
    AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
),

/* 2025新開戶有效戶交易量 */
NEW_OPEN_TXN AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        TXN.ACCT_NBR,
        NVL(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM, '2025YTD') AS YYYYMM,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN TXN
    INNER JOIN
        NEW_OPEN_ACC ON NEW_OPEN_ACC.ACCT_NBR = TXN.ACCT_NBR
    WHERE
        TXN.TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
        AND TXN.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 台股帳戶
        AND TXN.BRANCH_CODE IN ('9665', '961N', '962E', '961H', '9655') -- 桃園分公司, 青埔分公司, 樹林分公司, 新板分公司, 板橋分公司
    GROUP BY
        TXN.ACCT_NBR,
        CUBE(TXN.TXN_YYYYMM)
    )
PIVOT (MAX(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "JAN", '202502' AS "FEB", '202503' AS "MAR",
                                       '202504' AS "APR", '202505' AS "MAY", '202506' AS "JUN",
                                       '202507' AS "JUL", '202508' AS "AUG", '202509' AS "SEP",
                                       '202510' AS "OCT", '202511' AS "NOV", '202512' AS "DEC",
                                       '2025YTD' AS "2025YTD"))
)

SELECT
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司,
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員,
    TO_CHAR(NEW_OPEN_ACC.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYYMM') AS 開戶月份,
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.OPEN_DATE AS 開戶日期,
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,  
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳戶,
    NEW_OPEN_TXN.*
FROM
    NEW_OPEN_ACC
LEFT JOIN
    NEW_OPEN_TXN ON NEW_OPEN_ACC.ACCT_NBR = NEW_OPEN_TXN.ACCT_NBR
ORDER BY
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.BRANCH_NAME,
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.OPEN_DATE,
    NEW_OPEN_ACC.ACCT_NBR
;

需求.需求摘要: 查詢北三區部各分公司在高股利活動中的統計結果
篩選條件: 參與高股利活動的客戶
財管商品交易日期從2025-05至今

SQL.內容:
WITH 財管商品交易 AS (
SELECT
    BRANCH_CODE,
    PARTY_ID
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202505' AND '202508'
    AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' -- 複委託
    AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('962D', '9661', '962J', '9654') -- 新莊分公司, 新店分公司, 三峽分公司, 永和分公司
UNION
SELECT
    BRANCH_CODE,
    PARTY_ID
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUND_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202505' AND '202508'
    AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
    AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('962D', '9661', '962J', '9654') -- 新莊分公司, 新店分公司, 三峽分公司, 永和分公司
UNION        
SELECT
    BRANCH_CODE,
    PARTY_ID
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BOND_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202505' AND '202508'
    AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('962D', '9661', '962J', '9654') -- 新莊分公司, 新店分公司, 三峽分公司, 永和分公司
UNION
SELECT
    BRANCH_CODE,
    PARTY_ID
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_SN_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202505' AND '202508'
    AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
    AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('962D', '9661', '962J', '9654') -- 新莊分公司, 新店分公司, 三峽分公司, 永和分公司
UNION
SELECT
    BRANCH_CODE,
    PARTY_ID
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202505' AND '202508'
    AND POLICY_STATUS_CODE IN ('0', '1') -- 進件, 已核保
    AND BRANCH_CODE IN ('962D', '9661', '962J', '9654') -- 新莊分公司, 新店分公司, 三峽分公司, 永和分公司
)

SELECT
    CASE WHEN ACC.BRANCH_NAME IS NULL THEN '加總' ELSE ACC.BRANCH_NAME END AS 分公司,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ACC.PARTY_ID || ACC.BRANCH_CODE) AS 高股利名單人數,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN 財管商品交易.BRANCH_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN ACC.PARTY_ID || ACC.BRANCH_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS 財管商品交易人數,
    ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN 財管商品交易.BRANCH_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN ACC.PARTY_ID || ACC.BRANCH_CODE ELSE NULL END)/COUNT(DISTINCT ACC.PARTY_ID || ACC.BRANCH_CODE), 4) AS 財管商品實動率
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.ES_PROJECTDATA ES_PROJECT
LEFT JOIN 
    DM_S_VIEW.D_S_ACCT_COMBINE ACCT ON ES_PROJECT.ACNO = ACCT.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC ON ACC.ACCT_NBR = ACCT.ACCT_NBR_NEW AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
LEFT JOIN
    財管商品交易 ON 財管商品交易.BRANCH_CODE = ACC.BRANCH_CODE AND 財管商品交易.PARTY_ID = ACC.PARTY_ID
WHERE
    ES_PROJECT.PROJECT_NO = 'DSCUST0501' -- 主推_高股利名單
    AND ACC.AREA_CODE = '40' -- 北三區部
GROUP BY
    CUBE(ACC.BRANCH_NAME)
ORDER BY
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME
;

SQL.檔名: 板橋例行性報表 - 客戶總覽.sql
SQL.內容:
/* 例行性報表 - 板橋分公司客戶總覽 */

/* 板橋分公司有效戶母體 */
WITH 板橋有效戶 AS (
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 資料日期,
    ACC.BRANCH_NAME AS 分公司名稱,
    ACC.EMP_NBR 營業員員編,
    ACC.SALES_NBR AS 營業員代碼,
    ACC.SALES_NAME AS 營業員姓名,
    ACC.PROD_TYPE_DESC AS 帳戶類別,
    ACC.ACCT_NBR AS 客戶帳號,
    ACC.PARTY_ID AS 客戶證號,
    NAME.PARTY_NAME AS 客戶姓名,
    ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG AS 帳戶有效戶註記,
    ACC.OPEN_SOURCE_DESC AS 開戶來源別說明,
    ACC.F_PI_SIGN_FLAG AS PI簽署註記,
    ACC.BANK_DESC AS 交割銀行名稱,
    TO_CHAR(ACC.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS 開戶日期,
    ACC_INFO.KYC_RISK_DESC AS KYC, 
    ACC_INFO.AGE AS 年紀,
    NVL(經紀客群貼標.客群_帳號, 'G. 其他') AS 經紀客群,
    財管客群貼標.客群整合_NOW AS 財管客群
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INFO ACC_INFO ON ACC_INFO.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR AND ACC_INFO.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100'
LEFT JOIN
    S_CHIAHSUANHSU.PARTY_NAME NAME ON NAME.ACCT_NBR = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_ARIELSHAO.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026Q1 經紀客群貼標 ON 經紀客群貼標.客戶帳號 = ACC.ACCT_NBR
LEFT JOIN
    S_MELODYJJJIAN.CUSTOMER_GROUP_2026 財管客群貼標 ON 財管客群貼標.ID = ACC.PARTY_ID_MASK AND 財管客群貼標.分公司代碼 = ACC.BRANCH_CODE
WHERE
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
    AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨帳戶
    AND (ACC.ACCT_VALID_FLAG = 'Y' AND ACC.CLOSE_DATE IS NULL) -- 有效戶
),

/* 台股庫存 */
台股庫存 AS (
SELECT 
    ACCT_NBR,
    SUM(BAL_AMT_TWD) AS BAL_AMT_TWD
FROM 
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY
WHERE
    PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    AND SNAP_YYYYMM = (SELECT MAX(YEARMONTH) FROM DM_S_VIEW.M_RF_DATE WHERE S_WORKDAY = 'Y' AND DATE_DID < SYSDATE - 1)
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
),

/* 現貨交易量 */
現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
    WHERE
        TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
        AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
        AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
    GROUP BY
        ACCT_NBR,
        TXN_YYYYMM
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR TXN_YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "202501_現貨交易量",
                                         '202502' AS "202502_現貨交易量",
                                         '202503' AS "202503_現貨交易量",
                                         '202504' AS "202504_現貨交易量",
                                         '202505' AS "202505_現貨交易量",
                                         '202506' AS "202506_現貨交易量",
                                         '202507' AS "202507_現貨交易量",
                                         '202508' AS "202508_現貨交易量",
                                         '202509' AS "202509_現貨交易量",
                                         '202510' AS "202510_現貨交易量",
                                         '202511' AS "202511_現貨交易量",
                                         '202512' AS "202512_現貨交易量"))
),

/* 非現貨交易量 */
非現貨交易量 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD,
        SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) AS TXN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        (
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_UNIT_QTY AS TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '期選' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUTURE_TXN -- 期選
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '不限用途' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_LOAN_TXN -- 不限用途
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
            AND TXN_TYPE_DETAIL_CODE = '052' -- 新增
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '借券' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BSBL_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外股' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
            AND PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' -- 複委託
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '海外債' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_BOND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
        UNION ALL 
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '基金' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_FUND_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '結構型' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_SN_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
            AND BUY_SELL_CODE = '001' -- 買
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            PARTY_ID,
            TXN_AMT_TWD,
            '保險' AS PROD
        FROM
            DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_INSURANCE_TXN
        WHERE
            TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
            AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
            AND POLICY_STATUS_CODE = '1' -- 已核保
    )
    GROUP BY
        PARTY_ID,
        PROD
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(TXN_AMT_TWD) FOR PROD IN ('期選' AS "2025_期選交易口數",
                                   '不限用途' AS "2025_不限用途交易量",
                                   '借券' AS "2025_借券交易量",
                                   '海外股' AS "2025_海外股交易量",
                                   '海外債' AS "2025_海外債交易量",
                                   '基金' AS "2025_基金交易量",
                                   '結構型' AS "2025_結構型交易量",
                                   '保險' AS "2025_保險交易量"))
),

/* 貢獻度 */
貢獻度 AS (
SELECT
    ACC.PARTY_ID,
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE,
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('110', '150', '160', '180', '3C0', '3F0', '3P0', '3S0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023' THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2023_經紀貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('110', '150', '160', '180', '3C0', '3F0', '3P0', '3S0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024' THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2024_經紀貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('110', '150', '160', '180', '3C0', '3F0', '3P0', '3S0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025' THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2025_經紀貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '220', '230', '240', '420', '540', '6L0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2023'  THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2023_財管貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '220', '230', '240', '420', '540', '6L0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2024'  THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2024_財管貢獻度",
    SUM(CASE WHEN REV.PROD_MTYPE_CODE IN ('120', '210', '220', '230', '240', '420', '540', '6L0') AND SUBSTR(REV.SNAP_YYYYMM, 1, 4) = '2025'  THEN REV.REV_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END) AS "2025_財管貢獻度"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_REVENUE REV
LEFT JOIN
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC ON ACC.ACCT_NBR = REV.ACCT_NBR AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = REV.PROD_TYPE_CODE
WHERE
    REV.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202301' AND '202512'
    AND REV.REV_CODE != '6L1R01' -- 排除壽險大小公(會重複計算)
    AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
GROUP BY
    ACC.PARTY_ID,
    ACC.BRANCH_CODE
),

/* 融資餘額 */
融資餘額 AS (
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
    SELECT
        INV.ACCT_NBR,
        INV.SNAP_YYYYMM,
        SUM(INV.MARGIN_LOAN_AMT_TWD) AS MARGIN_LOAN_AMT_TWD
    FROM
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT_INVENTORY INV
    LEFT JOIN
        DM_S_VIEW.M_AC_ACCOUNT ACC ON ACC.ACCT_NBR = INV.ACCT_NBR AND ACC.PROD_TYPE_CODE = INV.PROD_TYPE_CODE
    WHERE
        INV.PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' -- 現貨
        AND INV.INVE_TYPE_CODE = '004' -- 融資
        AND ACC.BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
        AND INV.SNAP_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
    GROUP BY
        INV.ACCT_NBR,
        INV.SNAP_YYYYMM
    )
PIVOT
    (SUM(MARGIN_LOAN_AMT_TWD) FOR SNAP_YYYYMM IN ('202501' AS "202501_融資餘額",
                                                  '202502' AS "202502_融資餘額",
                                                  '202503' AS "202503_融資餘額",
                                                  '202504' AS "202504_融資餘額",
                                                  '202505' AS "202505_融資餘額",
                                                  '202506' AS "202506_融資餘額",
                                                  '202507' AS "202507_融資餘額",
                                                  '202508' AS "202508_融資餘額",
                                                  '202509' AS "202509_融資餘額",
                                                  '202510' AS "202510_融資餘額",
                                                  '202511' AS "202511_融資餘額",
                                                  '202512' AS "202512_融資餘額"))
),

/* 「台股定期定額」、「美股定期定額」、「美股ETF」 */
股票交易情形 AS (
SELECT
    ACCT_NBR,
    NULLIF(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' AND TXN_TYPE_CODE = '102' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS "台股定期定額金額(YTD)",
    NULLIF(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' AND TXN_TYPE_CODE = '102' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS "複委託定期定額金額(YTD)",
    NULLIF(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' AND PROD_STYPE_CODE = '019' THEN TXN_AMT_TWD ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS "複委託股票ETF金額(YTD)"
FROM
    DM_S_VIEW.M_AT_STOCK_TXN
WHERE
    TXN_YYYYMM BETWEEN '202501' AND '202512'
    AND BRANCH_CODE = '9655' -- 板橋分公司
    AND ((PROD_TYPE_CODE = '100' AND TXN_TYPE_CODE = '102') -- 台股定期定額
    OR (PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' AND TXN_TYPE_CODE = '102') -- 複委託定期定額
    OR (PROD_TYPE_CODE = '200' AND PROD_STYPE_CODE = '019')) -- 複委託股票ETF
GROUP BY
    ACCT_NBR
)

/* 最終表格整併 */
SELECT

    板橋有效戶.營業員員編,
